reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, studies, placements, and great fests.

review_content.Placements: Almost 80-85% of students got placed in my course last year, and their package ranges from 4 LPA to 12 LPA with an average package of 6 LPA. 90-95% of students got internships. I don’t know about the companies that came, but most of them are mid-range companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college has all the labs for each course and very good A.C. classrooms with all the facilities. The library of the college is also good with a very quiet atmosphere. The building infrastructure is top-notch. The canteen of the college is very great compared to all the universities, and the food quality is also good. The college has fewer grounds for sports compared to other universities, but other things related to studies are good, so in the end, everything is worth it.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Supportive faculty with decent infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: We don’t have the exact placement data for our course. Information on percentage placed, the highest, the lowest, and average package, top recruiting companies, internships, and offered roles has not been officially provided. The data on Google is the data we have.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is decent as expected from a university, with facilities like classrooms, labs, Wi-Fi, library, hostel, mess, canteen, medical, and sports. You have box cricket, volleyball, football, and badminton facilities. Everything works well there.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Information and Communication Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Honest review of Adani Institute of Infrastructure Engineering.

review_content.Placements: About 30-35% of students from my batch get placed from those who opt to sit for placements. The top recruiting companies are Adani and VI. The highest package offered to a student is 14 LPA and the lowest is around 4 LPA. Around 80-85% of students get internships from my batch.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel facility provided by the college. Students have to find accommodation on their own. The parts of the whole infrastructure that I like the most are the canteen and library facilities. Labs are decent. Most of the PCs work properly, except for a few.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Information and Communication Technology - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Life at Adani University.

review_content.Placements: Around 70% of students get placed in the branch of Information and Communication Technology. The highest package offered is around 41 LPA and the lowest package offered is 2 LPA. The average package offered ranges from 3-4 LPA in the course that I am pursuing. Top recruiting companies in Adani University for the B.Tech program include Tata Motors, Tata Consultancy Services, Adani, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus of Adani University is very small. Classrooms are well-furnished and well-equipped with projectors and air-conditioners. Wi-Fi is available on the whole campus of Adani University. The library contains a lot of books including different subjects and topics such as Mathematics, English literature, and Physics. The mess food provided in the hostel is of very good quality, and sometimes, we may have to compromise with the taste of the food.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: My Adani University (A Bittersweet Experience)

review_content.Placements: The placements here are decent, I won't say very good but also not bad. The average package offered in on campus placements is about 5-6 lakhs per annum. The highest this year was 12 lakhs per annum. Topper students prefer off campus placements as they get a much higher package that way. See even if you waste all 3 years of your B.tech you will still get a decent on campus placement here if you work hard in your last year. On average we see 80% of students getting placed about 10% get placed off campus(toppers) and 7-8% prefer going abroad or go towards further studies, only a small 1-3% students don't get placements primarily due to poor communication skills, I would suggest you to work on them from beginning. This year IQM has recruited the most number of students from your University. The roles offered are Web Dev, Data Analysts, App dev, Software developer etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Information and Communication Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: In our college, around 70% to 80% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered is 13 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 4 LPA and the average salary package offered is 5 LPA to 6 LPA. Top roles offered are SWE, SDE, data analyst, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is excellent. There is a place for every sport to be played, but it is quite small. Our college has some special rooms for girls and boys. Our college has a good lab.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers are well-qualified and mainly Ph.D. holders. The curriculum has changed since our college became a university. Regular workshops are conducted on various topics. Semester exams are easy.

overview_faqs.question: Can Adani University – Faculty of Engineering Sciences and Technology (AU-FEST) be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Adani University – Faculty of Engineering Sciences and Technology (AU-FEST) is a renowned institution offering B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Engineering. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Adani University – Faculty of Engineering Sciences and Technology (AU-FEST) boasts an impressive review rating of 3.7 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 3.7 for Campus Life, 3.58 for Placements, 4.15 for Faculty, and 3.65 for Infrastructure.

description: Adani Institute of Infrastructure Engineering cutoff 2025 is finally out for candidates seeking admission to BTech and BPharma programs. The GUJCET cutoff has been released for all categories and rounds for students belonging to the HS and AI quota. Candidates can also view other exam cutoffs from the exam-wise sections given below. Further updates are down below:

Adani Institute of Infrastructure Engineering provides admission to several UG and PG courses based on national-level exams. The institute offers BE and BTech courses based on valid JEE Main ranks. The institute also accepts GUJCET ranks for admission to BE/BTech/MTech. Adani Institute of Infrastructure Engineering accepted exams along with the courses as follows:

The Adani Institute of Infrastructure Engineering cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Adani Institute of Infrastructure Engineering BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 5292 and 8940 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Comput

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the HS quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 5292 for the general HS quota.

Adani Institute of Infrastructure Engineering accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Adani Institute of Infrastructure Engineering can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Adani Institute of Infrastructure Engineering GUJCET cutoff 2025 concluded with the final round cutoff list being published for various All India and Home State quota categories, like General, OBC, SC, etc. The cutoff was released for admission to B.E./ B.Tech course.
For the General HS category, the overall B.E./ B.Tech cutoff ranged from 5582 to 7932. According to the last round, the most competitive branch for admission was

This section provides the closing ranks for 2025, 2024, and 2023 for various categories, rounds, courses, and quotas. Students can refer to the table below to know the cutoff trend for the past 3 years.

In the final round for the General HS category, the Adani Institute of Infrastructure Engineering B.E./ B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged from 5582 to 7932, wherein the toughest branch was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning).

The Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC) released the GUJCET 2025 cutoffs for various participating institutions for admissions to all branches, rounds, categories, and quotas. Aspirants aiming for admission to the next academic session can refer to the table provided below to know the important GUJCET 2026 dates.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of Adani Institute of Infrastructure Engineering.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel facility provided by the college. Students have to find accommodation on their own. The parts of the whole infrastructure that I like the most are the canteen and library facilities. Labs are decent. Most of the PCs work properly, except for a few.

reviews.review_heading: Life at Adani University.
reviews.review_text: The campus of Adani University is very small. Classrooms are well-furnished and well-equipped with projectors and air-conditioners. Wi-Fi is available on the whole campus of Adani University. The library contains a lot of books including different subjects and topics such as Mathematics, English literature, and Physics. reviews.review_heading: My Adani University (A Bittersweet Experience)
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is above average I would say. We have well spaced classrooms, great ventilation with ACs in all classrooms, decent labs and above all a rich collection of books in our library. The library wifi is slow, others are decent. The food is canteen is savory and hygienic , also Adani University & Nirma University share the same caterers for their canteens. But the campus is quite small, it should have been bigger. I have not opted in for hostel as I live in city only so I commute to ...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is excellent. There is a place for every sport to be played, but it is quite small. Our college has some special rooms for girls and boys. Our college has a good lab.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college and faculty members, but a little eager for my placements.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is quite small but has all the facilities including Canteen,  2 Libraries, Wi-Fi, closed badminton court, table tennis tables, carrom boards, etc. I think most of the facilities are available at the campus. The only facility not available is Hostel.

reviews.review_heading: A Good Kickstart to your professional life.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is not too big. It's a compact one, but has many sports facilities like Badminton, Table Tennis, Volleyball, Football, Cricket etc. And Canteen facilities are also too good. Our campus is very happening too. As we celebrate many festivals together .

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and well-maintained facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is great and it is well maintained. Our campus is small compared to other colleges but it never feels crowded. Classrooms are smart and they provide benches and speakers. Wi-Fi is strong around the reception area, and the canteen is average. There are two libraries and contain all books. A basketball court, badminton court, table tennis, gym equipment, and many more are available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Adani Institute of Infrastructure Engineering is a good college.
reviews.review_text: It is the first of its kind in India, with a thrust on infrastructure backed by India's largest integrated infrastructure conglomerate. It has a unique outcome-based curriculum and internships. Extensive infrastructure is provided. They provide exposure to world-class practices. The extremely resourceful library is open for students from 8 am to 8 pm. The classrooms are modern and air-conditioned. There are well-equipped laboratories and workshops.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides good placements for 2022 with average package.
reviews.review_text: There is unlimited Wi-Fi. This college provides tasty and healthy food in the canteen. There is no hostel facility at this college. All classes have 6 air-conditioners and 12 fans. The infrastructure is good. The laboratories and classes are well furnished. Laboratories have all equipment for the experiment.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel for students. There are two libraries, a canteen and many laboratories for respected course. Libraries are well-equipped with required materials. Wi-Fi is available for all in libraries and canteen and not in classrooms. Coming to sports and games, we have 2-3 grounds of volleyball, basketball, and a general purpose ground. Classes are good. Indoor sports are also available. Canteen food and quantity is not upto the mark.

reviews.review_heading: Not value for money but has some good faculty and enjoying college life .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good but we get use to it after someday of college it does not proper playing ground of volleyball and basketball food is good classroom have average sometime, I feel my school play ground where better at lower fees and also the biggest point no hostel of the college .

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college but not the best. I suggest you join it if it is the last option.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. The ground is not good as other colleges. Classrooms are good and fully air-conditioned in our college. The campus is small compared to other colleges. The area in which the college is there is good. The library is good. Wi-Fi is available with good speed.

reviews.review_heading: College is good but not curriculum.
reviews.review_text: College don't have its own hostel but it has a few contacts which it can share to students so they can get hostels. Well there are two libraries. Classroom are nice and air conditioned and can accommodate around 60 to 70 students. Labs for ICT are around 5 to 6 all having windows OS.

review_summary.college_name: DY Patil University Pune Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Excellent and beautiful campus, with the best facilities. Placement needs improvement.

content.Placements: 65% of students are placed during the latest placement season. The recruiting companies are Adobe, Atlassian, TCS, Infosys, Deloitte, Amazon, Microsoft, and Google. The average package is 12.2 LPA. The top roles offered are software development, data science intern, machine learning intern, and web development intern.
content.Infrastructure: The department has well-equipped labs specific to the course, such as regular lab upgrades are done based on industry needs. There are ML, IoT, Robotics, and Embedded Systems labs, with high-performance systems and licensed software. The college hostel rooms are good, and it is a beautiful campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The campus is awesome, and the faculty is good, but the only thing is that placement is not good.

content.Placements: In my college, out of 600 students, only 50-60 students get placements. The students who have a 9+ CGPA have been placed. The highest package is 12 LPA and the lowest is 2.5 LPA. The roles offered by the course are Developer, Data Analyst, Data Scientist, ML Engineer, etc. Up to 90% have gotten an internship on the Edu Skills platform.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is the best. Entire campus have Wi-Fi networks, and labs are the best. Classrooms are also the best, and the library is average. The hostel is the best, but it is very costly. The quality of food available in the mess is good, and medical facilities are average. In sports, the university has a separate academy. The university's cricket ground hosts leagues like the Vijay Trophy, DY Patil Trophy, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college is nicely maintained, but it can also be more upgraded in various fields.

content.Placements: The college has average placement and offers. The Corporate Relations and Career Services Cell, i.e., the T and P Cell, works hard to bring companies to the campus. They try to bring in more start-up companies, which makes it easier for students to get placed. The average placement CTC offered is 6–7 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure provided to students is quite good. Our college has multiple labs set up for students to study, which helps them grow their skills and gain experience in their particular domain. The hostel facilities are also available for students, located near the college only.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Graphic Design - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The campus is so peaceful.

content.Placements: I am a B.Des. in Graphic Design first-year student from D Y Patil University, Pune. There is no specific package to tell. It is all based on our skills, how we create it, and gain knowledge from it. Companies will hire us on the basis of our skills.
content.Infrastructure: The college has facilities like Wi-Fi, a good ambience, and tables according to our department, which are comfortable, so we can work properly. The hostel has Wi-Fi and a mess facility. The food in our mess is good. We do have other food items.

individual_reviews.course: B.Des. in Graphic Design - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I love the campus, and it has the greenery.

content.Placements: I am a first-year B.Des student at DY Patil University. Placements are always based on our skills, but the college provides a lot of guidance to us. They offer plenty of skills and resources, so by the last year, we are fully prepared for placements with skills.
content.Infrastructure: The college is nice. We have a library, computer lab, and a workshop for working on models. The classrooms are well infrastructure, and the tables are according to the work, so they are comfortable. Both the hostel and the college have Wi-Fi. The food is good.

admission_overview.college_name: DY Patil University Pune Admission 2025: Fee, Dates, Eligibility & Selection, Application

admission_process.title: DY Patil University Pune Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: DY Patil University Pune admissionsare primarilyentrance-based. The university accepts national or state-level entrance exams such as NATA,MHT-CET, CMAT, MAH CET, etc. for admission to specific courses. The university also conductsDYPCETfor admission to some of the courses such asBBA, MBA, etc. DYPU Pune offers a wide range of UG, PG, and doctoral programmes to students acrossEngineering, Management, and Science, among others.DY Patil Puneoffers courses through seven schools. Interested candidates can apply online on the official website of the university.

DY Patil University Pune is currently accepting applications for all courses. All the programmes are offered in full-time mode at UG, PG and doctoral levels. Below are keyDY Patil Pune admissionhighlights:
Particulars
DY Patil Pune Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study

DY Patil Pune admission 2025is based on entrance exam scores for most of the courses. Candidates also need to fulfil course-specific eligibility to apply for a course in DYPU. Given below is the list of some of the popularDY Patil Pune coursesalong with their selection and eligibility criteria:
Bachelor's degree with a minimum aggregate of 50%

Check otherDYPU Pune Courses

All the candidates seeking admission to DYPU, need to appear in an entrance test to secure a seat in their desired course. The seat intake varies depending on the programme. Programmes such as BArch have a very limited intake while a large number of students can be admitted to the BTech programme at DY Patil University. The table below shows the number of seats available for some of the courses at DY Patil University:
Note: Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university-sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The university offers admission both on an entrance and merit basis. Candidates have to get through all the selection rounds of the respective course to get a seat. The admission process involves application form filling and a selection process followed by counselling or an interview (for some courses). Below is the step-wiseDY Patil University Pune admission process:
STEP 1: DY Patil Pune Application Process 2025

The DY Patil Pune application process is carried out in online mode. Thus, aspirants can apply by visiting the official website of the university. The application process involves online registration, form filling, document upload, and fee payment. Candidates need to pay an application fee ofINR 800for UG and diploma courses. The application fee for PG programmes isINR 1,000.
STEP 2: Selection Process

DY Patil Pune accepts entrance exam scores for admission to most of the courses. The university accepts MHT CET, JEE Main, UCEED, NEET, etc. for admission to specific programmes. For UG, the candidates also need to qualify for Class 12. For PG courses, graduation in the relevant discipline is required. Candidates with the minimum qualifications will be eligible for admission. For the MBA, the university also calls candidates for the Written Ability Test and PI round.
STEP 3: Fee Payment & Admission Confirmation

The university releases a course-wise merit list on the official website of DY Patil Pune. Candidates who make it to the final selection list or are selected after counselling can pay the required amount of fee to confirm their seat. Also, the selected candidates have to submit specified documents for verification.

placement_data.title: DY Patil University Pune Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per the official data available, the highest package offered during DY Patil University Pune placements in recent past stood at INR 12 LPA . In addition, 100% internship offers were made and more than 500 companies visited the campus during DY Patil University Pune placements 2024.

According to the School of Management brochure, the average package offered during Management placements in recent past stood at INR 4.8 LPA . 100% internship was provided as well to Management students during the recent placement drive.

The University has a placement cell known by the name of Office of Career Services . The University has also established two platforms , namely CIAP (Centre for Industry and Academia Partnerships) and Centre for Excellence KRITI to promote innovation-driven environment at the campus. These two platforms are designed to act as a bridge between the University and companies with the objective of developing future skills, research work and final placement drives.

hostel_campus.college_name: DY Patil University Pune Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
D Y Patil University is residential campus. Accommodation is made available in three separate building in the campus for boys and girls, and has 1000+ capacity. For the food, campus has Legend Café managed by professional agency to cater the vegetarian and non-vegetarian food.  Hostel accommodation is allotted to students on First Cum First Service basis during the first year. The occupancy is single bed /double bed and triple bed and allotted to the students as per the availability.
It has the best accommodation facilities for boys and girl students. Campus provides students with modern and comfortable hostel facilities, catering to diverse needs and interests. Students have the flexibility to choose between twin-sharing and triple-sharing rooms, each furnished with unlimited high-speed Wi-Fi and regular housekeeping services. For the safety of students is a top priority, with full-time wardens, CCTV monitoring, and biometric entry enabled at security gate.

library.description: D Y Patil University library has a collection of 75000+ books . Library has the spacious reading hall and Libraries are equipped with books, journals, E Resources & Data bases. The library e-resources: JGATE, IEEE, Springer with plagiarism software.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent and beautiful campus, with the best facilities. Placement needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: The department has well-equipped labs specific to the course, such as regular lab upgrades are done based on industry needs. There are ML, IoT, Robotics, and Embedded Systems labs, with high-performance systems and licensed software.  The college hostel rooms are good, and it is a beautiful campus.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is awesome, and the faculty is good, but the only thing is that placement is not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the best. Entire campus  have Wi-Fi networks, and labs are the best. Classrooms are also the best, and the library is average. The hostel is the best, but it is very costly. The quality of food available in the mess is good, and medical facilities are average. In sports, the university has a separate academy. The university's cricket ground hosts leagues like the Vijay Trophy, DY Patil Trophy, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The college is nicely maintained, but it can also be more upgraded in various fields.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure provided to students is quite good. Our college has multiple labs set up for students to study, which helps them grow their skills and gain experience in their particular domain. The hostel facilities are also available for students, located near the college only.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is so peaceful.
reviews.review_text: The college has facilities like Wi-Fi, a good ambience, and tables according to our department, which are comfortable, so we can work properly. The hostel has Wi-Fi and a mess facility. The food in our mess is good. We do have other food items.

reviews.review_heading: I love the campus, and it has the greenery.
reviews.review_text: The college is nice. We have a library, computer lab, and a workshop for working on models. The classrooms are well infrastructure, and the tables are according to the work, so they are comfortable. Both the hostel and the college have Wi-Fi. The food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Worth the Money and Average Placements.
reviews.review_text: Now, this is the good part, the hostel is good, and the mess facilities are decent at best. The workshop has all the basic equipment, but items used, like wood and thermocol, have to be supplied by students themselves, along with the additional cost and travel and arranging transport to bring them to the college workshop.

reviews.review_heading: A single floor college.
reviews.review_text: Food in canteen is decent, a bit pricey but okay. The hostel is strict and doesn't allow students to go out after 7:00 PM, forcing students to use canteen food for dinner that way. The area around the hostel is bad, crime rates are at the highest, and transport issues are there as it's in the middle of nowhere.

reviews.review_heading: Review for D. Y Patil University, Ambi, Pune.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi services are available full-time, and electricity backup is also there along with an abundant water supply. The hostel has three types of rooms single, double, and triple. Water coolers are placed on every floor in each building. Washing machines are available in hostels. There are two types of hostels old and new.

reviews.review_heading: If you have no option left and you think that you can study on your own. But, just need a degree.
reviews.review_text: In terms of infrastructure, there's no doubt they have massive buildings. There are a total of 5 buildings, and all are above 7 floors. Classrooms are pretty huge, and they have a professional cricket ground. However, they lack auditoriums. The one we have is super small.

reviews.review_heading: I am not so satisfied with faculty members, and placements are not there.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and campus are pretty good and well-maintained. Wi-Fi facility is available, and there is a library and canteen are available. The infrastructure for the course is decent, not good, but there are huge spacious classrooms with proper ventilation and sunlight. However, desks are not good, and the seating is not proper. There is no proper management, no computer labs, and no proper facilities. However, the college has a cricket stadium, which is one of the biggest.

reviews.review_heading: Dr. D. Y. Patil College, Pune - Good campus and teachers, strong industry tries.
reviews.review_text: I like the atmosphere of our college because of the greenery and refreshing air with multiple buildings and spacious too. Lack of faculty members according to the fees we pay for our college. Management is not good and should take initiatives properly and responsibly. I hope they take our feedback properly also and are properly maintained. We take a lot of effort to complete it with sleepless nights. But still, our assignments are not given that much value for the efforts we have made, thank you...

reviews.review_heading: A transformative college experience with strong academic and professional campus life.
reviews.review_text: Departments are offered well-equipped design studio, CAD labs, model making workshop, high-speed Wi-Fi, good library, and smart classroom. The library is stocked with design journals, books, and resources. Hostel facilities are clean, secure, and comfortable offering a peaceful environment for students. The mess provides hygienic food with decent variety. The canteen provides additional snacks. Medical facilities are provided on campus. Sports facilities are provided for both indoor and outdoor ...

reviews.review_heading: A transformative college experience with strong academics and vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facilities are provided. Hostel is well maintained, but has a few restrictions. Canteen food is pretty good. Sports and games I am not really interested.

reviews.review_heading: Recommendations for a good architecture college.
reviews.review_text: New hostel block is completely good with all sorts of modern equipments. The cleaning and maintenance of the hostel is done well. There are options to choose from single, double, and triple sharing rooms. Wi-Fi and laundry facilities are also available at the hostel here.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and campus worth it.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities like well-equipped Wi-Fi, library, many sports events keep happening, with good cricket ground, basketball court, football, and volleyball also. It has good canteen services with hygienic food. Good toilets are there. The campus is always clean.

college_info.college_name: DY Patil University Pune

data.description: Yes, D Y Patil University Pune offers separate hostel facilities for boys and girls. The hostel has 167 rooms for girls and 160 rooms for boys. There is a separate bathroom in all types of rooms. Water supply and generators are provided to each building to ensure 24*7 uninterrupted power supply. The canteen at DY Patil University is spacious with modern furniture and provides traditional food of various tastes from various states of India at a reasonable price. It serves snacks, beverages, breakfast, lunch, and dinner at a charge.

college_info.college_name: Compare DY Patil University Pune

college_info.intro:
LNCT University popular programmes are MBBS, BSc, and BTech. MBBS is offered for a duration of 4.5 year. The university also offers internship to the UG/PG and various other course students. During the internship period, students are given practical training to become successful health practitioners. After the successful completion of the MBBS programme, students could either pursue higher education such as MD, MS, etc. or can start their practice.
LNCTU also offers a BTech course. The university offers BTech specialisation in various fields such as Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical & Electronics Engineering, Civil Engineering, Information & Technology, etc. LNCTU Bhopal students are placed in top companies in various sectors. BTech students can work as Web Developers, Data Science Engineers, Automotive Developers, Mechanical Engineers, and others. individual_reviews.course: BBA in Business Intelligence and Analytics - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: In our college, the faculty is helpful, and placements are average at their best.

content.Placements: Around 40-50% of students were placed from the last batch. The highest package is usually 10-12 LPA, the average is 6 LPA, and the lowest is 4 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS, Housiey, and Hike Education. 10% of students got internships. The top roles offered are business analyst and business developer.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in the labs, though some of the systems in the labs don't work. The washrooms are cleaned regularly. The canteen is good, with various options, and is very affordable.
content.Faculty: Most of the teachers are indeed helpful. For the specialization part (BIA), our college is partnered with TNL, and the trainers are skilled and helpful. The teaching quality still has a long way to go. The curriculum is good, but its execution needs improvement. If you study, you can pass without much struggle. The pass percentage is 95%.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is worth getting into this college.

content.Placements: LNCT University is one of the best colleges in Bhopal in terms of everything. Placements are top-notch. 70-80% of students get jobs with an average package that ranges from 3-4 LPA. The highest package offered ranges from 9-10 LPA. Mass recruiting companies regularly visit, like TCS, Infosys, HCL, Capgemini, and Hexaware. It also offers internships.
content.Infrastructure: Since college is old, the infrastructure is not good-looking, but it's not a big concern for students. Classrooms have a smart board, and labs have advanced devices. The library has a collection of various types of books. It has a Wi-Fi campus with good speed. Hostel facilities are acceptable. It really maintains the taste and hygiene of meals. In the canteen, a variety of meals are available for students.

faqs.question: What is the MBA course fee at LNCT University?

faqs.question: Is studying at LNCT University expensive?
faqs.answer: Yes, LNCT University is certainly on the expensive end of the spectrum. The university provides a wide range of courses through its various affiliated colleges. Some of the courses are relatively inexpensive compared to other courses. However, the fee does go as high asINR 58.4 lakh. Students are required to pay certain components of the total fee at the time of admission. Students can visit the official website of the university for further fee related queries.

faqs.question: What is the admission requirement for LNCT University courses?

faqs.question: Is Class 12 marks enough for LNCT University admission?
faqs.answer: LNCT University admissions are done on both merit and entrance basis. Students looking to apply for the UG courses offered at the university must have passed Class 12 in the relevant field from a recognised board.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to LNCT University?
faqs.answer: No, LNCT University does not accept direct admissions for any of its courses. Students seeking to apply for the programmes offered at the university are required to fulfil the eligibility and selection criteria of the university before filling out the application form. Admissions to a majority of the courses is through candidate's performance in the qualifying exam. For a few courses, the university also considers a valid score in national-level entrance exams, such as NATA, NEET, JEE Main, etc. In case of an admission related query, aspirants can contact the admission help desk of the university via email or phone.

hostel.description: The hostel provides air-conditioned rooms and separate mess for each hostel, 24X7 wi-fi facility for uninterrupted internet connectivity,  late hours library facility, and common room of each hostel with LCD, Magazines, and Newspapers.
facilities: Hostels: LNCTU offers accommodation facilities to its students. It has separate hostels for boys and girls.

library.description: The central library has a ready stock of books, journals, magazines, and newsletter from all over the world, replete with all kinds of support activities, like photocopying, audio-visual rooms, electronic media section, mapped with various reputed libraries in India. Apart from the central library, each department has its own departmental library.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Volleyball Courts, Lawn Tennis

library.description: The central library has a ready stock of books, journals, magazines, and newsletter from all over the world, replete with all kinds of support activities, like photocopying, audio-visual rooms, electronic media section, mapped with various reputed libraries in India. Apart from the central library, each department has its own departmental library.

hostel.description: The hostel provides air-conditioned rooms and separate mess for each hostel, 24X7 wi-fi facility for uninterrupted internet connectivity,  late hours library facility, and common room of each hostel with LCD, Magazines, and Newspapers.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Volleyball Courts, Lawn Tennis

reviews.review_heading: In our college, the faculty is helpful, and placements are average at their best.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in the labs, though some of the systems in the labs don't work. The washrooms are cleaned regularly. The canteen is good, with various options, and is very affordable.

reviews.review_heading: It is worth getting into this college.
reviews.review_text: Since college is old, the infrastructure is not good-looking, but it's not a big concern for students. Classrooms have a smart board, and labs have advanced devices. The library has a collection of various types of books. It has a Wi-Fi campus with good speed. Hostel facilities are acceptable. It really maintains the taste and hygiene of meals. In the canteen, a variety of meals are available for students.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for the MBBS course.
reviews.review_text: The campus is good. Lecture theatres are awesome with air-conditioning. All labs which are required by students are present on campus. Every facility is provided which is indeed required so go for it if you are getting this college in counseling.

reviews.review_heading: I am completely satisfied with the faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The campus is okay. The mess food is average. Overall, facilities in the hostel are good. The infrastructure is also good. The college has different departments and each department has its own labs so students can understand more topics through practicals. The campus has many colleges in the university. The college has its own sports grounds for extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Best university I have ever seen.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is good and well-managed. The quality of the food in the mess is excellent, and the taste is also good, I like it. The canteen also serves many varieties of food. Medical facilities are quick, and all emergency needs are available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the campus placements and the money they charge for the course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and departments for all courses are pretty good enough and the conditions of labs, Wi-Fi, and libraries are good. The hostel facilities are good and the mess food is acceptable with good medical facilities and sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: A place that we all desire of, we get it, if we want so.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available. There is Wi-Fi, large classrooms, a library, a computer room, and the main facility for all of us is the Moot Court. The law department has its own separate building, like all other departments. Interaction between teachers and students is also great.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very best college in the Bhopal.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available, which we need support. There is a big kitchen for practical and computer lab for front office. Practical, housekeeping, and restaurant services are available for practical. Hostel is very neat and clean. Very good food is available here. There is very good facility for study.

reviews.review_heading: Review of LNCT University.
reviews.review_text: Facilities at LNCT University are great with smart classrooms equipped with projectors, modern labs and central library. The hostels are clean and have basic amenities. The mess food is average but the canteen offers a variety of options. Medical aid is available 24/7 and there are good sports grounds along with indoor games and many sports events.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, everything is good, but campus life sometimes feels like school rather than college.
reviews.review_text: labs are well-facilitated, Wi-Fi connections are good, and classrooms are okay. The library has lots of magazines and books. I don't live in the hostel, so I don't know much about it, but according to my friends, the college hostel rooms are spacious, and the mess is good.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and learning.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good and with a lush green campus. LNCTU has a modern infrastructure with well-equipped labs, libraries, smart classrooms, hostels, sports facilities, and auditoriums. Some buildings do not have a modern infrastructure like the MCA department.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college for study.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well arranged. Wi-Fi is also available. Labs are very good. Library are present with facilities of AC. Hostel has excellent infrastructure. Hostel has the facility of AC and non-AC. Many types of games are played like cricket and basketball.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good placement opportunities, with around 70% of students placed.
reviews.review_text: The college has a well-maintained campus with good infrastructure. It offers Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a spacious library. The hostel has decent food, and the cafeteria provides a variety of options. Sports facilities include a gym and a playground. There are basic medical facilities on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Come and have the best experience with the best faculty members and good placements.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in the college. The infrastructure of the college is very good. Our college provides a gym, cafeteria library Wi-Fi. Smart classrooms and many more things. All medical facilities are provided by the college. The canteen and mess are good. Sports facilities are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the classrooms, library, and labs is above decent, as the fees are competitive, neither too high nor too low. Wi-Fi is available in library. Facilities of hostel are decent as the food is above average but rooms are good. Canteen is open till 6:00 PM and prices are above average. Medical Facilities are available Every year college Olympics are organized.

highlights.summary:
The CSAB Special Counselling 2025 Round 3 has concluded with the announcement of the seat allotment results for Ghani Khan Choudhury Institute of Engineering and Technology admission to BE/BTech courses.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Ghani Khan Choudhury Institute of Engineering and Technology:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Ghani Khan Choudhury Institute of Engineering and Technology offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and After 10th levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from stream such as Engineering. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech. For the After 10th level, there is a wide range of courses like After 10th Diploma. Ghani Khan Choudhury Institute of Engineering and Technology fee structure ranges between INR 1,800 to 1,29,558.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Average placement at GKCIET College.

review_content.Placements: In mechanical engineering branch, there have been 50% of placements provided to the students. Not many companies come to this college. In this college, there is only theoretical knowledge provided. Only those students who have good CGPA are used to get placements here.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not much good. Lab is dirty, not so properly maintained. Faculty members used to take some serious action about mess food, playing ground, medical facilities, footpath, etc. Mess food is not much good every day for hostel students which is very serious topic to solve.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The future is very bright.

review_content.Placements: Average placement rate here is 60 to 70% students are placed 2025. The highest placement offers 6.5 LPA from electrical engineering. The rest are below average. Still CSE batch has not passed out, so placements are low. After CSE passout, placement scenarios will be better. In food technology, placements are very good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not fully completed, by 2035, the campus will be completed. Now 4 departments and 1 library building are present, with 2 hostels. Classrooms simply do not have a digital board. CSE have 4 labs, with around 30 computers each. No Wi-Fi is present in hostel or academic areas.

review_summary.college_name: Ghani Khan Choudhury Institute of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil and Environmental Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: GKCIET is growing day by day.

content.Placements: Our batch comprises 60 students. Currently, no students have been placed as the first batch of our branch will graduate in 2027. There is currently no information about the highest and the lowest packages, as no batch has graduated. Internships are mandatory in our college, and most of the students can get them.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is nice, and there are various new infrastructures coming soon, as they are under construction. Wi-Fi is present in the department building, admin block, and library, but is not provided in the hostel. Our hostel is good and livable. We are provided with a cot, a table, and a chair in the rooms. Mess food is average. Nothing more can be expected, but there is one good meal every month in which they serve delicacies. The college has an MBBS doctor present, and the ambulance facility is always ready. Most sports and games are played, including volleyball, football, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: If you want to get a good education in less price, you can choose this college.

content.Placements: Placement of the college is not so good. Of course, companies visit during placement, but you will not be hired as per your salary expectations. You will have to work more on yourself. Here, teachers will mostly suggest you to appear for GATE examinations.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is good. There are elevators in hostels and college buildings are really good. Although, due to the sudden increase in the number of students in the past few years, 3 students are made to adjust in a room meant for 2 students. But the work of building new hostels is going on.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Average placement at GKCIET College.

content.Placements: In mechanical engineering branch, there have been 50% of placements provided to the students. Not many companies come to this college. In this college, there is only theoretical knowledge provided. Only those students who have good CGPA are used to get placements here.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not much good. Lab is dirty, not so properly maintained. Faculty members used to take some serious action about mess food, playing ground, medical facilities, footpath, etc. Mess food is not much good every day for hostel students which is very serious topic to solve.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The future is very bright.

content.Placements: Average placement rate here is 60 to 70% students are placed 2025. The highest placement offers 6.5 LPA from electrical engineering. The rest are below average. Still CSE batch has not passed out, so placements are low. After CSE passout, placement scenarios will be better. In food technology, placements are very good.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is not fully completed, by 2035, the campus will be completed. Now 4 departments and 1 library building are present, with 2 hostels. Classrooms simply do not have a digital board. CSE have 4 labs, with around 30 computers each. No Wi-Fi is present in hostel or academic areas.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I'm dissatisfied with the hostel, faculty, and campus placement.

content.Placements: In our EE branch, only 4-5 students out of 50 are placed, and the placements in this college are average. The highest package is 6 LPA, and the average package is 3-4 LPA. No core or IT companies visit this college. Maybe next year, like 2026 or 2027, more recruiters will come. Internships are a strong area in this college. There are internships in a local power plant, a railway, a food company, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: In this college, the infrastructure is not so good. Wi-Fi does not work properly in our college, and the library closes after the class. There is no good ground for cricket. Medical facilities are good, but the quality of food in the mess is not good.

reviews.review_text: In this college, the infrastructure is not so good. Wi-Fi does not work properly in our college, and the library closes after the class. There is no good ground for cricket. Medical facilities are good, but the quality of food in the mess is not good.

reviews.review_heading: This is not a really good college. The name is only CFTU, but there is no feel like this.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi. There are labs, but the machines are under progress. The hostel life is totally bad. In a single room, 2-3 will be forced to live. If anyone objects, the response is to leave the hostel. There is no infrastructure developed. When the current goes, it goes, and there is no backup.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, but the management is poor. Fees are low.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are good, and the environment is quiet, but Wi-Fi is not provided. Labs are equipped with necessary equipment. Classrooms are provided with projectors, but the use of the projector depends upon the teacher. The hostel has very strict rules. If you are new, you can go for the hostel, but after that, you can see outside accommodation. The canteen is not equipped with necessary items. Sports are good.

reviews.review_heading: GKCIET is a peaceful and green campus with decent academics and supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: GKCIET has decent facilities for B.Tech. The campus has 24/7 Wi-Fi, and the computer labs are well-equipped with updated systems and software. The library is good too, with around 9,000 volumes, but it is open till 5:00 PM only, which makes no sense as we are having classes the whole day and a strict 75 percent rule. The overall campus is clean, green, and includes sports facilities and a health center for students, as well as an ambulance. The hostel mess serves breakfast, lunch, evening snacks...

reviews.review_heading: Good, but not the better.
reviews.review_text: There is a library and labs for all departments. Wi-Fi facility is available only in the placement cell, not in the college hostels. Our college facilities are good but not the best. The food in the mess is also just average. There is no canteen at present. The medical facilities are available, and sports and games are conducted.

reviews.review_heading: Very good teachers and growing college for now.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good in our college. Every department has different building. Currently, we have 2 hostels and 2 more buildings are under construction. There is no Wi-Fi in the hostel. There is a central library. Here most of the books are available and also digital books are available.

reviews.review_heading: One of its advantages is it has good connectivity. Malda Town railway station is just 8 KM away.
reviews.review_text: Our college has two hostels, i.e., SV Hall, which is for first-year students and girls, and SC Bose Hall, which accommodates the rest of students. The college campus is quite good. Overall, the experience has been average to good. The hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: GKCIET is a great college with really great infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Labs are fully equipped. Classrooms are great. The central library is great, and we will get the perfect ambiance to study books. Facilities in the hostel are top-notch. Lift available in hostel and rooms are great. The mess food quality needs to be improved.

reviews.review_heading: Hostel facilities and faculty members are good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our department are not good. There are small labs which can't accommodate many students. The equipment is less. The library is good and well-maintained. The hostel is very good and comfortable. It has a balcony, one bed, a chair, a table, and fans. Around 2 students can stay in each room. The mess facilities are not good. The food quality is not good. Students will get free Wi-Fi in the canteen. Its food is not as good as expected. Every year, sports are organised as part of annual...

reviews.review_heading: Review on overall experience at GKCIET.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like labs, classrooms, and the library are very average. They are not very spacious but okay. Wi-Fi is present on campus but is accessible only by faculty members. The hostel is spacious with double and triple Bed rooms. A new hostel is in progress. The food is very bad in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Ghani Khan Choudhury Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Course completion was average. The course covers a variety of fields. The campus canteen provides moderate food while the hostel mess provides horrible food. The hostel on the other hand is well-equipped and well-maintained, clean, and spacious. Rooms are big enough for sharing without having any trouble.

reviews_list.review_title: My college is better than other private colleges.

review_content.Placements: As a student of Kamla Nehru Institute. I like to share that my college was better than a private Institute. The percentage of students placed every year in my course department was very high compared to private colleges. The highest package was about 12 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in my course department were like Wi-Fi. Classroom labs, ground, washrooms, etc, were very good according to the fees taken from students.
review_content.Faculty: Teacher and faculty of my course department are very cooperative towards their student. The semester examination are not that difficult for regular students of my college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: My college Kamla Nehru Institute of Technology.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our institute are not very good, especially for core branches like Electrical, Mechanical, and Civil. But you can expect about 2 to 8 LPA if you are in branches like IT or CSE. Recently, I have heard that some CSE branch students got 12 LPA. But it is a good option if you want to prepare for government jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are limited. We have a small number of toilets and bathrooms, 4 bathrooms and 6 toilets on each floor, where about 80 students live. Some bathroom doors are broken, and we have geyser facilities in bathrooms. But the rooms are fine, good enough, and Wi-Fi facility is good in our hostel. Mess facility is also good. Labs are good, especially basic Electrical Engineering labs. We have 3 canteens, 1 ice-cream parlour, 2 cyber cafes, and 1 stationery shop within the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It’s decent but not preferable.

content.Placements: I was in batch 2020-24, till that time, placements weren't good. But now it's better as per juniors, and also I've followed up the liked in page of placement cell, so I know that. It's better to be safe, so focus on coding if you're interested or start preparing at the earliest.
content.Infrastructure: In the hostel, Wi-Fi was available. Clean drinking water was available most of the time. Mess was good. Although the food was average. The rooms were quite decent. In summers it's a bit of a problem for their students who lived on the floors above. The ground floor was fine. Not near the washrooms, though. Classrooms were good. Air-conditioned as well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: College life is fun. The college conducts fests on a regular basis.

content.Placements: Placements are decent. The highest package offered is 45 LPA (in 2023). The average package ranges from 4 to 8 LPA. Major recruiting companies for our course are TCS, Wipro, Infosys, etc. CSE and IT courses generally perform better in placements. The lowest package offered ranges from 3.5-6 LPA in core branches.
content.Infrastructure: The college offers separate facilities for both boys and girls with facilities like 24/7 power and water, decent Wi-Fi facilities, furnished rooms (beds, tables, chairs), security, and common halls. It also has a mess with average food, laundry, and medical support.

description: Kamla Nehru Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about Kamla Nehru Institute of Technology UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:
A few more updates are given below:

The Kamla Nehru Institute of Technology cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Kamla Nehru Institute of Technology BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 59421 and 138874 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Computer Science and En

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 59421 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 63776 in 2023 and 44084 in 2022. On analysing the cutoff data of three years, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering demonstrated fluctuating trend.

Kamla Nehru Institute of Technology accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Kamla Nehru Institute of Technology can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Kamla Nehru Institute of Technology JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for Kamla Nehru Institute of Technology.

KNIT Sultanpur MCA course is offered through CUET PG scores. According to the KNIT Sultanpur cutoff for Round 1 in 2023, the closing ranks for Master of Computer Applications (MCA) was 1104 for the General category students. Analysis of cut offs for previous years for MCA reveals that KNIT Sultanpur has seen an increasing trend compared to 2022. Refer to the table given below to check the Round 1 and the Last Round i.e Round 2 closing ranks MBA offered by KNIT Sultanpur through CUET PG scores fo

KNIT Sultanpur cutoff 2023 for admission to MCA course was concluded after Round 2 of CUET PG Seat Allotment result. Considering the KNIT Sultanpur last-round cutoff, the closing ranks for MCA was 1344. In 2022, the last round closing rank for KNIT Sultanpur for MCA was 242. Analysing the previous year's cutoff, KNIT Sultanpur has witnessed an increasing trend for the MCA for the General category students. For more details, candidates can refer to the table given below:
Listed below are the important KNIT Sultanpur MBA cutoff 2024 dates offered through CUET PG:
Tabulated below are the consolidated PDFs for MBA course offered by KNIT Sultanpur through CUET PG scores in the downloadable formats for the last two years:

As the Kamla Nehru Institute of Technology UPTAC Cutoff 2025 has been concluded for all rounds and categories under the AI and HS quota. Students can refer to the table below to find the Round 1 and Last Round closing cutoff ranks for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations available at Kamla Nehru Institute of Technology.
In this section, students can see UPTAC Cutoff 2025 for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations.

For 2025, in the last round, the top three most competitive specialisations for admission in the General AI category students were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, followed by B.Tech. in Electronics Engineering, and B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering, with the closing ranks of 69026, 126395 and 134133, respectively.

For admission to Kamla Nehru Institute of Technology for B.E. / B.Tech students have to clear the UPTAC exam and attain valid ranks to qualify for a seat at this institute. Students can see the table below to know the important dates for admission to Kamla Nehru Institute of Technology.

reviews.review_text: Infrastructure in KNIT, Sultanpur, is getting better year by year. College is full of plants and trees, which makes the college look more beautiful, and the playground is very large in this college. All sports are held here, badminton, cricket, volleyball, basketball, and many others. If you want, you can also join the club.

reviews.review_heading: The college is full of events and fun.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms are air-conditioned with very good faculty. Labs are average. We have an air-conditioned library. The hostel is nice with 2-seater, 3-seater and single occupancy depending upon the year. Wi-Fi speed is also good enough for studying. And the toilets and bathrooms are average.

reviews.review_heading: Good, but needs some changes.
reviews.review_text: The campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled with high-speed internet in academic blocks and hostels. Classrooms are well-ventilated and equipped with projectors for smart teaching. A large central library with a large number of books, journals and reading space is available, along with departmental libraries. Separate boys' and girls' hostels with mess, common rooms, water purifiers and 24/7 electricity. A computer centre with modern systems supports programming and research work. There are many sports wh...

reviews.review_heading: Shan-e-sulyanpur KNIT Sultanpur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the Kamla Nehru Institute of Technology, of the department buildings, is very old but of very top-notch quality. Wi-Fi and computer labs are also present there, and a well-maintained library is also present. The quality of the hostel is above average. The quality of the food is very good, and sports facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Navratan-e-Sultanpur, Kamla Nehru Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our department include computer labs and free Wi‑Fi. Classrooms are well-maintained from the second year onwards. The quality of food in the mess is above average. The canteen is also available. Sports facilities are limited.

reviews.review_heading: Somewhat satisfied because of the supporting faculty, dissatisfied in terms of the crowd.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are average, not too good, and not too poor. The college has decent classrooms, labs, a library, and Wi-Fi. The hostel is good. It is double occupancy for the CS branch, while other branches may get triple occupancy rooms. Mess food is good, with a variety on different days.

reviews.review_heading: Good study culture with not-so-good placement ratio.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not good at all. Everything looks old here, from the building to everything. The hostels are not good, everything is old, and the Wi-Fi they provide is not good either, it doesn't work most of the time, and when it does work, it gives very little speed.

reviews.review_heading: College of nature and engineers.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my course/department is very good. A very fast speed wi-fi connection, digital classroom, and central library are available. My hostel facility is very disciplined.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college and all the faculty members. Placements are getting better year by year.
reviews.review_text: A good Wi-Fi, clean and sufficiently spaced classrooms, a good library, and almost every facility for students are available. Hostels have average facilities, sometimes, water is not available at the taps. You have to go to another hostel to fill water bottles.

reviews.review_heading: Decent college with respect to the feels charge .
reviews.review_text: The facilities given by the college are good but the old hostels are not renovated, the Wi-Fi speed of the hostels are not so good. The food given in the hostel is quiet decent and the canteen facilities are also good but the sports facilities for the 1st year hostel is not that good.

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Delhi Technical Campus, Greater Noida admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Delhi Technical Campus, Greater Noida:

college_info.intro:
Delhi Technical Campus, Greater Noida popular programmes are MBA and BTech. MBA students are placed in top companies at top positions such as HDFC Bank, Shipsy, and others. MBA students can become Managers, Team Leaders, or can join various other job profiles. BTech students are provided technical training on various software and the latest technology. The following are the USPs of joining Delhi Technical Campus, Greater Noida:
• Transport Facility in Delhi NCR• Six Technical Students' Societies, Seven Socio-Cultural Societies & NSS (National Service Scheme)
• NBA-Accredited• Fully Air Conditioned, Wi-Fi Campus • ICT enabled classrooms to enhance collaborative learning • ERP-enabled online classes• On Campus Secure Air Conditioned Hostel (Separate for Boys & Girls)• MoUs with Corporate giants like Amazon, Oracle, Palo Alto • Virtual Lab supported by IITs • Centre of Excellence in the field of AI. • Provide Internship opportunities in Govt. Office • Value Added Courses for holistic development of the students• Collaboration with CISCO for Certification in Networking and others
Below mentioned are some of the Delhi Technical Campus, Greater Noida courses and their respective eligibility and Delhi Technical Campus, Greater Noida fee:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Delhi Technical Campus, Greater Noida offers PG and UG courses to students. These courses are provided across the Management, Engineering, and various other streams. At the UG level, the college offers four-year BTech, three-year BBA, and BCA courses to students. BTech is available in 8 specialisations, namely Computer Science & Engineering, Computer Science & Technology, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, and others. At the PG level, the college offers a two-year MBA course to students. Below mentioned are some of the DTC Greater Noida courses and their respective eligibility and :

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely regretting joining this college.

review_content.Placements: The highest placement is around 24 LPA. You have to work hard to get the opportunities. Many companies visit the college, but only worthy students get placement. Rest, try for an off-campus placement, apart from that, you shouldn't reply to Tier 3 college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infra is superb in a 5-acre area, but there is no playground to play outdoor games like cricket and football, however, a basketball court is under construction. Hostels are well versed, all facilities are there, no need to worry at all, but you have to compromise with the mess food.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: DTC is fine if you don’t have any other options.

review_content.Placements: A decent number of students get placed on about three grounds on the campus. Some big companies also show up, which did not happen before. The highest package is about 30 LPA, and the lowest is about 2 LPA. About 30% of students get placed on campus. The recruiting companies are mostly startups.
review_content.Infrastructure: On campus, Wi-Fi is available except in the library. Labs are decent and upgraded for the next semester. Classrooms can hold about 75 students, and the library is spacious, quiet, and well-equipped. The hostel is clean, the food is satisfactory, and face recognition is required for every entry and exit.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Delhi Technical Campus, Greater Noida.

review_content.Placements: 70-80% of students got placed. The remaining 20% of students did not get placed because they didn't study the course. The highest package is above 16 and the lowest is 4 LPA. Top recruiters are Meesho, Amazon, Google, etc. I don't know about the internships currently I am in 2nd year so I will be experiencing this soon.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. All books are available in the library. There are very good surroundings for studies. The hostel facilities are good, food is plentiful, and the environment is safe for both boys and girls.

individual_reviews.title: In the future, I know that my college is good in Noida.

content.Placements: Now I am currently studying in 2nd year, but I know that the recruitment of my college is above average. Last year, many students are selected in many companies like Infosys, HCL, etc. My college also includes some high-level companies like Deloitte and other companies.
content.Infrastructure: My college infrastructure is very good. It provides both girls’ and boys’ hostels with clean mess, and it is also good for day scholars. This year, they have completely made a new football ground and some other activity areas. They also made Steve Jobs Labs where students can access Mac systems and other high-level computers, iota labs, and many more facilities.

admission_overview.college_name: DTC Greater Noida Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

admission_process.title: Delhi Technical Campus Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Delhi Technical Campus admissionsare primarily entrance-based. The campus accepts national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main, IPU CET, CUET, etc.DTC Greater Noidaoffers UG and PG courses in affiliation withGGSIPU. The campus offers admission to courses at UG and PG levels, including BTech, MBA, BBA and BCA Aspirants can apply online on the official website of GGSIPU for their desired programme

DTC offers admission to UG and PG courses based on the entrance exam score. Besides, candidates also need to fulfil the eligibility criteria for admission to any of the DTC courses. Find belowDelhi Technical Campus coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Class 12 withPhysics, Chemistry andMathematicswith at least 55% aggregate and passed in each subjects separately
Candidates must additionally have passed English
3 years or more bachelor's degree in any discipline with a minimum of 50% aggregate
Download:Delhi Technical Campus Eligibility Criteria 2025

DTC admission process includes multiple steps that students must follow. Beginning with registration to admission confirmation, all the steps are necessary. Check below step-wise Delhi Technical Campus admission process:
STEP 1: Delhi Technical Campus Application Process 2025
Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria need to apply online. Aspirants must apply on the official website of GGSIPU and select Delhi Technical Campus as the preferred institute.
STEP 2: Selection

After registration, aspirants are selected based on their merit or entrance exam score.IPU CETconducted by IP University is also considered for admission to courses such as BBA, BCA, BCom (Hons), etc. Other accepted national-level entrance exams includeJEE Main, CUET, CAT, CMAT, etc.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation

Once shortlisted, candidates are required to come for document verification. Selected candidates need to pay programme fee to confirm their seat in the institute. Below are the documents required for admission:
Download:Delhi Technical Campus Admission Brochure

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

description: Delhi Technical Campus, Greater Noida cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Delhi Technical Campus, Greater Noida JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:

Delhi Technical Campus, Greater Noida cutoff 2025 was released via GGSIPU entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 220264 and 236425 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 220264, B.Tech. in Compter Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same

The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

This conclusion was derived after considering their last round closing ranks.
