hostel_campus.college_name: DTC Greater Noida Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: In the future, I know that my college is good in Noida.
reviews.review_text: My college infrastructure is very good. It provides both girls’ and boys’ hostels with clean mess, and it is also good for day scholars. This year, they have completely made a new football ground and some other activity areas. They also made Steve Jobs Labs where students can access Mac systems and other high-level computers, iota labs, and many more facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It's having good infrastructure but fee is little high.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good here in all departments and courses. All classes are air-conditioned with good conditions. Colleges have Wi-Fi in all classes with a good range. Specifically, there are specific labs for specific departments like cybersecurity lab, done lab, fintech lab, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely regretting joining this college.
reviews.review_text: Infra is superb in a 5-acre area, but there is no playground to play outdoor games like cricket and football, however, a basketball court is under construction. Hostels are well versed, all facilities are there, no need to worry at all, but you have to compromise with the mess food.

reviews.review_heading: DTC is fine if you don’t have any other options.
reviews.review_text: On campus, Wi-Fi is available except in the library. Labs are decent and upgraded for the next semester. Classrooms can hold about 75 students, and the library is spacious, quiet, and well-equipped. The hostel is clean, the food is satisfactory, and face recognition is required for every entry and exit.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Delhi Technical Campus, Greater Noida.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. All books are available in the library. There are very good surroundings for studies. The hostel facilities are good, food is plentiful, and the environment is safe for both boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: It is not worth the money. The campus, faculty, placements, and area, everything is disappointing.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very small. There is not much to do there. Classrooms have AC so that's good. Labs are functional and do what it's a job. Libraries have all books needed for our course. There is only one canteen inside campus with very limited food choices. There is no market or shop in the vicinity so we have to look for that.

reviews.review_heading: Delhi Technical campus students' life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is also quite good, with Wi-Fi available in every classroom and well-equipped computer labs for subjects like Chemistry and Electronics. The hostel facilities are satisfactory, and the food provided in the mess and canteen is average. Additionally, medical facilities are available on campus, and there are sports grounds for activities such as cricket, badminton, and football.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of Delhi Technical Campus, Greater Noida.
reviews.review_text: The college has a central library with all kinds of books and a pleasant environment for study and overall the infrastructure is quite nice and happening. Labs like computer and per-subject research labs are also there with every basic facility. The hostel is quite good as compared to others.

reviews.review_heading: I found this college good in terms of facilities, infrastructure, faculty members, and placements.
reviews.review_text: I found very good infrastructure and facilities over here at Delhi Technical Campus, about every course and branch in every department. Hostel is also good in terms of security, and child safety perspective. Here food is also good in taste and hygiene. Sports and games are available if there is a child's interest.

reviews.review_heading: It is the truth about Delhi Technical Campus.
reviews.review_text: In infrastructure is very good. We have 2 badminton course, one volleyball court also a football court without Cricket, practicing that, so overall sports facilities are good in college. We also have four blocks for each of the branch We also have block dedicated to the cell of the college, like cell, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The gravity of DTC in my own words which helps students to take decision about their future.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not very good. I think there should be more balanced infrastructure. College should have to increase their campus size. Wi-Fi is present on college campus but they have limited access and with password. Classrooms of our college are well designed with air-conditioned. There is a big library in our college that has a sufficient number of books for the students for their course.

reviews.review_heading: Real facts of DTC that can help students make decisions about their future without any hesitation.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are well in our college. The course and departments are very helpful. There is a Wi-Fi connection with a secure password and limited time. Labs in our college are well-maintained. Classrooms are quite good and are air-conditioned for limited hours. The quality of the mess and canteen food is quite good. There is a primary-level medical facility in our college, and although there are no big sports, some games are organized, such as volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: It is an overall average college if you want to pursue your CSE desire.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite good, with four blocks with A Block, B Block, C Block, and D Block. These are divided into CSC, AML, and Architecture with Wi-Fi and computer labs and, Chemistry lab extra with a big library. Where you can study and get your study materials. There are two hostels, one for boys and one for girls. The boys' hostel is smaller than the girls' hostel, but it is quite sufficient. There is also a mess where you can get a four-time force and a canteen where you...

reviews.review_heading: Reality of Delhi Technical Campus, Greater Noida.
reviews.review_text: The college offers Wi-Fi, a library, laboratories, and classrooms for each course. There are three Windows labs, one Linux lab, and one iOS lab available for students. The library is tidy and well-maintained, and the campus is green and welcoming. All classrooms and labs are equipped with air conditioning. If you choose to stay in the college hostel, you are required to adhere to several protocols that many students find unnecessary. These protocols seem to provide no advantage to either the stu...

reviews.review_heading: The basic point you need to know.
reviews.review_text: Adequate facilities such as classrooms, libraries, laboratories, sports facilities, medical facilities, sanitary facilities, and computer labs. In the hostel, we get all the basic facilities like Wi-Fi, gym, laundry, and a healthy mess for food.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Delhi Technical Campus, Greater Noida

likes.text: Top recruiting companies are BYJU's, Toppr, IBM, Wipro, TCS, Infosys etc.
Students will get placed in big brands like Wipro and Microsoft, if students are consistent with their studies and goals.

likes.text: The quality of facilities in the hostel is also good, and the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is also very good.
In our college, there are good labs with Wi-Fi connectivity, air-conditioned classrooms, vast libraries with course-related books, a medical room, and a counselor room.

likes.text: They follow the curriculum of IP University and also teach additional topics when there is time before our final exams.
The teachers are well qualified and also have good knowledge of their subjects.

reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the college is good, but campus life is missing. There is no garden for students.

review_content.Placements: 73% of students were placed. The highest placement in B.Tech CSE was 23 LPA and the lowest was 2.5 LPA. 80% of students got placed in internships in companies like IBM, InfoTech, Infosys, TCS, and many more. Some students who didn’t get placed were because they didn’t attend the interview, got an internship on their own, or were rejected.
review_content.Infrastructure: The thing which I love the most about my college is the food court. We nearly have 30 food courts, including 3 restaurants at the college. The library is underground and is spread over a large area with lavish interiors and a vibe of learning. Labs and classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and lift facilities are provided.

review_summary.college_name: Silver Oak College of Engineering & Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Silver Oak University - The click bait.

content.Placements: Placements are average in terms of package like average package if somewhere between 4 LPA - 5 LPA. The highest would be 8 LPA - 9 LPA. I don't guess it's above this limit. Companies that come for placements are in a good amount but few of them are top MNCs, and every company is like normal.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very congested like only concrete and buildings in a small space. There are no open areas, no garden, nothing.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are average. Exams are also somewhat political. If you get backlogs in some subjects, they unknowingly fail you again and again just to capture the examination fee, and will pass you out at some random moment in time. They are very money-centric. Course is designed by seeing top courses but at last students have to study themselves because in college they complete course just for completion.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Truth of Silver Oak University.

content.Placements: Placement percentage of the Computer Science domain is around 60 to 65%. Students got PPOs from their companies. The highest package offered is 7.5 LPA for TST Technologies, Ahmedabad. The lowest varies from department to department. I am from the Cyber Security department, and the lowest package we got is 1.7 LPA. Around 90-95% of students got internships. Top roles were SDE1, full-stack developer, and MERN stack developer.
content.Infrastructure: This college has a big campus, not too big and not too small. But compared to the strength of students in every department, the campus looks overcrowded during peak college timings. The college has its own hostel for boys and girls, with separate hostels. I don't know the fee structure, but you can get the fee structure on the college website. The hostel offers both AC rooms and non-AC rooms to students. The college doesn't offer Wi-Fi in labs and classrooms, and there are three big libraries.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is good, but campus life is missing. There is no garden for students.

content.Placements: 73% of students were placed. The highest placement in B.Tech CSE was 23 LPA and the lowest was 2.5 LPA. 80% of students got placed in internships in companies like IBM, InfoTech, Infosys, TCS, and many more. Some students who didn’t get placed were because they didn’t attend the interview, got an internship on their own, or were rejected.
content.Infrastructure: The thing which I love the most about my college is the food court. We nearly have 30 food courts, including 3 restaurants at the college. The library is underground and is spread over a large area with lavish interiors and a vibe of learning. Labs and classrooms are fully air-conditioned, and lift facilities are provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My college review of Silver Oak University .

content.Placements: My college name is Aditya Silver Oak College of Engineering & Technology. My college has 70% placement. The highest package is 5 LPA. The lowest package is 1.5 LPA. The average package is 2.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Royal Enfield, Hyundai, and Honda. In college, 50% of students have an internship.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good and modern. And also, all labs and classrooms are available with air conditioning. The class room has good condition benches; this batch is very comfortable and value for money. Silver University also has a spots club.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is good for events and other activities but not for study .

content.Placements: If you want to admission in my college you atleast need a 70% merit and . The highest package of my college as i know is 8lakh and lowest is 3 lakh per year. In our college the companies recruiting is Surekha Private etc. Now I am in 4 th year so many companies are coming for students for intership. If they pass the interview they are hire in their company. There are many role in offers in company like data analytics, web developer etc.
content.Infrastructure: Socet infrastructure is really amazing and very good may be campus is small as area wise but the building is very huge , in our college there are 4 building the highest building is 10 floor and classroom are really big. Wifi is available but not for students. Canteen are a is also good there are many stole for food and food are amazing.

admission_process.title: Silver Oak College of Engineering and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Silver Oak College of Engineering and Technology admission 2025is currently open. The college offers BTech and MTech courses at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the college also offers diploma courses. To get admission toSOCET, candidates will be selected as per the Government of Gujarat/ ACPC. The college offers more than 12 (including specialisation) courses in the streams of Engineering. The application process at Silver Oak College of Engineering and Technology is conducted online. Read the following article to know more aboutSOCET course admission2025.

The mode of study at Silver Oak College of Engineering and Technology courses is full-time. To enrol for various course admission, candidates must complete the last educational qualification set by the college. Read on to know more aboutSOCETcourse admissions2025.

SOCET courses' admissions are based on ACPC counselling. Candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection of allSilver Oak College of Technology courses:
Read more:Silver Oak brochure
The selection criteria at Silver Oak College of Engineering and Technology is based on ACPC counselling. Students can check below the admission process for course admission throughACPC counselling:

headings.text: Silver Oak College of Engineering and Technology Admission Highlights 2025
Silver Oak College of Engineering and Technology Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection Criteria
Steps for Silver Oak College of Engineering and Technology Admission Process 2025

lists: The admission committee of ACPC prepares the merit list for the eligible candidates and releases it on the official website.
ACPC counselling process will be done in many rounds. The admission committee will be responsible for scheduling the online counselling.
The candidates have to select the colleges and courses on the official website of ACPC.
ACPC seat allotment will be displayed on the website and the allotment of seats will be based on the category of the candidate, merit, and availability of seats.
Candidates have to pay the required fees to the committee. In case the fee is not paid, the application of the candidate will be cancelled automatically.

faqs.question: Is M.Tech course available at Silver Oak College of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: Yes, M.Tech course is available at SOCET. The college offers two-year M.Tech course at the PG level. In order to apply for this course, candidates must complete graduation with 50% aggregate. In order to be eligible for the award of the degree the candidate shall successfully complete the course in a maximum period of two years from the date of enrolment for the first semester of the course. Candidates must pass graduation (common eligibility) to apply for M.Tech course at SOCET.

Students must pass Graduation with a 50% aggregate. Silver Oak College of Engineering & Technology offers full-time M.Tech courses of two years' duration. Students can get into this course based on a valid ACPC Counselling.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for course admission at Silver Oak College of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: No, aspirants will be selected through ACPC counselling. Candidates who are looking for course admission at Silver Oak College of Engineering and Technology, Silver Oak University must complete the last educational qualification set by the college. For BTech course admission, aspirants must pass Class 12 in Science stream from a recognised Board/University. For M.Tech course admission, candidates must pass graduation with a 50% aggregate.

Since the application portal is live, candidates can apply online for their preferred course. SCOET, Silver Oak University offers BTech and M.Tech courses at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the college also offers Diploma courses.

faqs.question: Does Silver Oak College of Engineering & Technology accept JEE score?
faqs.answer: Yes, Silver Oak College of Engineering & Technology accepts JEE Main scores for admission to its B.Tech programs. The college also accepts other entrance exam scores such as GUJCET, GATE, and CMAT. To seek admission to this college, students must meet the cutoff criteria and secure good marks in the required exams

reviews.review_text:
Course/Department Infrastructure:
Wi-Fi: The campus offers Wi-Fi connectivity, allowing students access to online resources, research material, and programming tools needed for their course. Labs: The IT department is equipped with state-of-the-art computer labs with the latest hardware and software. Labs provide access to programming environments, database systems, and networking tools essential for practical learning.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college because of faculty members, events, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members are very good at teaching. They are strict and have no chance to bunk the class. You have to get permission if you want to leave or bunk the class. There is a minimum one AC and Wi-Fi in every lab, but there is no AC in our classroom. That's funny but acceptable as per the price.

reviews.review_heading: Get the best experience at SOCET.
reviews.review_text: The course includes a wide range of subjects, including both fundamentals and advanced topics. Classrooms are nice and labs are also available with a capacity of 20–60 computers. In hostels, Wi-Fi is free but electricity is not included. That's why students have to pay electricity bill every month.

reviews.review_heading: Big companies don't come to this college, so we have to apply offline.
reviews.review_text: The course is very good, but most of the faculty are college pass-outs, so they don't have enough knowledge. They are just college pass-outs who are looking for a job, and they do this teaching job part-time. The technologies they teach are very old.

reviews.review_heading: Provides quality education for an affordable fee.
reviews.review_text: The design of the college building is beautiful. The course is relevant to computer software and programming. Our department provides well-equipped labs with systems and AV monitors in classrooms for effective teaching. The best teachers are in teaching, and there is a Wi-Fi connection available in the lab.

reviews.review_heading: Poor Campus Life but Good Internship Opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is average because there is no ground or garden on campus. The Classrooms and labs have marker boards and some have AC facilities. Wi-Fi is not available on campus. Some classrooms are transformed into hostels. Hostellers have to take their meals in college canteens. The Medical facilities aren't available around the college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is fully crowded.
reviews.review_text: Air-conditioners are available in classrooms and labs. Almost 25 computers are available in the labs. Each classroom accommodates 70 students. The canteen is excellent. Hostel facilities are not available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are good. The quality of the food is good. Purified drinking water is provided. Electricity is available. The hostel fee is Rs. 80,000 per year. Experienced wardens and security guards are present to ensure safety and security on the premises. The college is under CCTV surveillance.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Silver Oak College of Engineering and Technology, Silver Oak University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides good facilities. The hostel facilities are good. Our college has Wi-Fi, labs, etc. Classrooms are equipped with projectors. They provide many courses. All the facilities are good.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Silver Oak College of Engineering and Technology (SOCET)

likes.text: Many national and international companies like Amazon, IBM, Airtel, LG, TCS, Zomato, and Reliance visit our college for recruitment.
The University take pride in offering its students opportunities to secure position with these highly reputed companies, showcasing its commitment to facilitating successful career transition.

faqs.answer: A:    The BTech program at Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Gorakhpur University (DDU) has 75 seats available for each of the four specialities.The specialties include: Information TechnologyComputer Science and EngineeringElectronics & Communication EngineeringMechanical EngineeringThe university also offers direct admission to some courses based on merit. Admissions are based on the entrance exam conducted by the university, or national-level entrance exams such as JEE Main and CAT.  DDU offers over 10,000 seats for more than 72 courses. The university is affiliated with 341 colleges.
faqs.question: How many seats are available for the BTech programme at DDU - Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Gorakhpur University?

faqs.answer: A:    No, JEE scores are not accepted by DDU Gorakhpur University (DDU GKP) for admission to its B.Tech programs.DDU GKP requires consideration of the UPSEE (Uttar Pradesh State Entrance Examination) score for admissions to the B.Tech program.The scores from JEE Main or JEE Advanced are not recognized. Students must show up for UPSEE.Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Technical University (AKTU) administers UPSEE for admission to all of its affiliated engineering colleges.The engineering departments at DDU GKP, including Mechanical, ECE, and CSE, are affiliated with AKTU.Counselling is done based on preferences and UPSEE scores. Seats are distributed to students based on their UPSEE rankings, category, grades, etc.DDU GKP accepts qualified candidates' valid GATE scores for admission to the M.Tech program. JEE results are not taken into account.

faqs.answer: No, Deen Dayal Upadhyay Gorakhpur University (DDU Gorakhpur) does not accept CUET in its admission process. Rather, the university carries out its own entrance examination- the DDU Entrance Test- within both the undergraduate and the postgraduate courses. The applicants that are supposed to be admitted should apply to take this exam via the official portal of the university and take the test following the set date. The admission process is primarily made on the basis of the merit and rank achieved in DDU Entrance Test only and no weight is given to CUET scores at any point of the selection process.
faqs.question: Q: Does DDU accept CUET?

faqs.answer: Yes, MBA is offered at Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Gorakhpur University. DDU onducts its own entrance exam called the DDU MBA Entrance Exam, which tests the aspirng candidates on aptitude, reasoning, general awareness, and English proficiency. To be eligible for the MBA programme the candidates need a bachelor's degree with at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from a recognized university.

review_summary.college_name: DDUGU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is an affordable government college with good faculty and average placements.

content.Placements: The placement percentage is minimal, and I think only about 5 percent of students get placed. The highest package offered is very rare in the rarest cases. No companies visit the college. Mostly, local institutes, coaching centers, small firms, or NGOs visit the college. Internships are self-arranged by colleges and are mostly not beneficial, so students should prefer finding internships themselves. In short, I will say that placements are not good. Here I have seen that most students, even my classmates, prepare for government exams or improve their skills by doing computer courses or other skill-based courses.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: So all of that is college is minimal good. The facilities are also available in this college.

content.Placements: The percentage of placement was between 70 and 80 percent. The highest package was 5 LPA - 6 LPA, and the lowest was 2.5 LPA. Companies were Deloitte, Infosys, and local companies. About 10 to 20 percent of students got internships. Roles offered were business management, finance analyst, marketing executive, and business executive.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities were available, like labs, classrooms, library, cafeteria, ground, etc. Some facilities were also available in this college, which you could see after admission. The food quality was bad, not so good. But in the canteen, there was something enhanced. Medical facilities were available. Sports and games were also very good.

individual_reviews.title: All facilities are the best at this college.

content.Placements: 5 LPA is the highest average package of this college, and many companies hire internship students. The lowest package is 2 Lacs in all courses. Telecalling companies and many more companies are involved. 95 percent of students got internships from all courses in many more companies.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides the very best facilities of labs, classrooms, and the library. Best facilities in the canteen. Medical facilities are good. No more facilities for canteen meals and food. Many more facilities are the best. For example, lab, computer lab, classrooms, and library facilities are the very best.

individual_reviews.title: The admission is worth it at DDUGU for studying purposes.

content.Placements: There was no chance of placement, but you could receive an opportunity for an internship from outside if you applied for it. DDU offered various types of courses across different streams, but the placement was zero because, in reality, no companies came there.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities were good. The management was supportive. Everyone helped you, except teachers, because professors were not good. They didn’t come on time. The sports ground was very large, but no sports equipment was available for students. It was only for show, as the college had a NAAC A+ rating. The infrastructure was not good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good college and satisfied faculty, good placements, really good infrastructure and facilities, etc.

content.Placements: Many companies from Delhi and Noida have conducted placements, and 30% of our students received internships from Noida-based companies. We need to improve the internship process. Top roles offered are chartered accountant, businessman, accountant, bank officer, CEO, air hostess, etc, lots of career options.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available. We have good classrooms. The library is available. The hostel is not available for girls, but near the college, there are PGs and rooms available. Hostel available for boys, but near the college, also have PGs and rooms available. In the hostel, meals are not available.

The DDU GKP cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech courses. During the DDU GKP BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 275182 and 1359535 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering. The first round cutoff rank for the same st

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the HS quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 275182 for the general HS quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 287704 in 2023 and 177516 in 2022. On analysing the cutoff data of three years, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering demonstrated fluctuating trend.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Digvijay Nath Post Graduate CollegeReviewed on 19 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It is an affordable government college with good faculty and average placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite decent. Classrooms are spacious but traditional. Only a few classrooms have digital boards. The library is good for academics, with a good collection of academic books. The college also has a separate female library to study quietly. Wi-Fi is limited or average. I haven't got any Wi-Fi, and maybe I didn't know much about this part. Labs provide basic facilities as per the requirements of the course. Hostels are available with simple rooms and okay food ...

reviews.review_heading: So all of that is college is minimal good. The facilities are also available in this college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities were available, like labs, classrooms, library, cafeteria, ground, etc. Some facilities were also available in this college, which you could see after admission. The food quality was bad, not so good. But in the canteen, there was something enhanced. Medical facilities were available. Sports and games were also very good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Madhusudan Das Degree CollegeReviewed on 20 Oct 2025)
reviews.review_heading: All facilities are the best at this college.
reviews.review_text: The college provides the very best facilities of labs, classrooms, and the library. Best facilities in the canteen. Medical facilities are good. No more facilities for canteen meals and food. Many more facilities are the best. For example, lab, computer lab, classrooms, and library facilities are the very best.

reviews.review_heading: The admission is worth it at DDUGU for studying purposes.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were good. The management was supportive. Everyone helped you, except teachers, because  professors were not good. They didn’t come on time. The sports ground was very large, but no sports equipment was available for students. It was only for show, as the college had a NAAC A+ rating. The infrastructure was not good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and satisfied faculty, good placements, really good infrastructure and facilities, etc.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available. We have good classrooms. The library is available. The hostel is not available for girls, but near the college, there are PGs and rooms available. Hostel available for boys, but near the college, also have PGs and rooms available. In the hostel, meals are not available.

reviews.review_heading: Based on my B.Sc, good campus, limited placement, no canteen, irregular exams, and stressful.
reviews.review_text: The campus is really wide and green with decent infrastructure. You get Wi-Fi, an auditorium, a convention hall, playgrounds, plus separate courts for badminton and basketball. There's a central library and hostels for both boys and girls. No canteen inside, but plenty of food arts right in front of the college. Parking is available too, both free and paid.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Digvijay Nath Post Graduate CollegeReviewed on 4 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Digvijaynath college has a curriculum.
reviews.review_text: Digvijaynath College provides Wi-Fi, a project board with clean classrooms, a library, and students can take a book from the library to home, or they can study in the library is full of silence and discipline. Students follow the rules and regulations, which can improve their body language.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Digvijay Nath Post Graduate CollegeReviewed on 26 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: So, you got a golden opportunity to get admission.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there are smart boards in classrooms which help students improve their skills. The library is full of books that you can read in class and prefer to take home. There is the best and delicious food in the canteen, and the hostel is fully neat and tidy.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Draupadi Devi Vidhyanchal MahavidyalayaReviewed on 22 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are cleaned and well-maintained daily, and NCC cadet facilities are also provided in the college. While Wi-Fi is not available, you will find a large library and labs. The college ground is very big, allowing for sports and large annual programs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Marwar Business SchoolReviewed on 5 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite good. Wi-Fi facility is available in all departments. Classrooms are good. There is one library. The hostel facilities aren't available, so most students stay in PGs, hostels, or flats outside the campus. It's neither good nor bad.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Maharana Pratap MahavidyalayReviewed on 2 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Hamara college bohot aacha hai. Aap yahan pe admission le skte h.
reviews.review_text: Our college has big classrooms. All the equipment in our college lab is good, and all equipment is available. Our college also has a library where you can get 24-hour free Wi-Fi. All sports are available in our college. You can also pursue sports here. Gym facilities are also available here.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus environment and learning facilities, with research-oriented courses.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for M.Sc. courses at Deen Dayal Upadhyay University, Gorakhpur, is satisfactory and well-suited to academic needs. Each department has its own dedicated building with classrooms, laboratories, and departmental libraries. The laboratories for subjects like Chemistry, Physics, Botany, Zoology, and Microbiology are equipped with essential instruments and are regularly updated based on syllabus requirements. Lecture halls are spacious, ventilated, and equipped with basic teaching ...

reviews.review_heading: It is a fabulous college.
reviews.review_text: B.A. infrastructure is basic but functional, with classrooms and a central library. Wi-Fi availability is campus-wide but can be inconsistent. Hostel is basic. It has affordable rooms. Food quality and fee around is INR 22,000/year (including mess).

reviews.review_heading: My college is the best in this area.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available at my college are very bad, and the college department is good. The classroom and library are good. The quality of facilities in my hostel are very bad. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is so poor. Medical facilities, sports, and games are good.

reviews.review_heading: Worst university for MBA in Uttar Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: Overall, it was good. There was no separate department for MBA, it was run by commerce department. You had to cover two departments for any official work. Labs and Wi-Fi were not available. Library was very short with least number of books.

faqs.answer: Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed diploma in engineering/technology or 3 years B.Sc degree with Mathematics as one of the subjects And secured at least 45% marks (40% marks reserved category) from a recognized university.MCACandidate must have passed bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with Mathematics as one of the subject at Intermediate or Degree level with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Pros and cons of Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering by me.

content.Placements: In GVPCE, nearly 60-70% of students are placed in our course, and the higher package in mechanical engineering is around 12 LPA, the average is 4-6 LPA, and the lowest is 3.6 LPA. The top recruitment companies are Infosys, Wipro, Cognizant, etc. The top roles offered are product manager, design engineer, and nearly 80% of students get internship offers from companies likes Renolt, Hyundai, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure in our college are good enough, and the labs and classrooms are well-maintained. The hostel food facilities are okay for minimal prices, and they provide good medical facilities and encourage students for sports and games in our mechanical department. A madam named keerthi, she teaches us the C language and the mechanical subject. She is very supportive of students by guiding them.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The problems and facilities in Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering.

content.Placements: 60% of students were placed in our course. 10 LPA is the highest, 1 LPA is the lowest, and 5 LPA is the average package offered in our course. TCS, Wipro, and Cognizant are the top recruiting companies for our course. 30% of students got internships from our course in Renault, Hyundai, TCS, and Wipro companies. System engineering, AutoCAD designer, and technology analyst are the roles offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good enough, but facilities are a little low. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good with minimal prices, and the quantity of food is also good. Sports and games are also given priority. Separate hours will be provided for that, tournaments will also be conducted, and students are also interested in participating.

However, the college does not require CUET for admission to any course. The accepted entrance exams at GVCPE Visakhapatnam include Andhra Pradesh EAMCET, Andhra Pradesh ECET, APICET, Andhra Pradesh PGECET, and GATE.

faqs.question: What is the fee for MCA at GVPCE?
faqs.answer: Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering offers a 2-year MCA course. The tuition fee for MCA at GVPCE costs between INR 1.1 L to INR 1.2 L. This fee is exclusive of other components such as application fee, examination fee, security deposit, etc. The fee is taken from the official website, but is still subject to change. Candidates are advised to visit the official website before applying to GVPCE.

faqs.question: Can I join GVPCE without entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering admissions are completely based on merit. The college offers admission only on the basis of valid entrance scores. In order to secure admission to the institute, candidates must appear for the accepted entrance exams and acquire the specified eligibility criteria. The application process takes place online. Candidates must follow the step-by-step process to secure admission to the institute.

hostel_campus.college_name: GVPCE Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The College has separate hostel facilities for boys and girls well equipped with all amenities. All the hostels have their own cooking and dining rooms supervised by different in-charges and only serves Vegetarian cuisine

library.description: The library is well equipped with modern facilities and resources in the form of CD / DVD -ROMs, Video Cassettes. Online Databases, Micro Documents, Video Cassettes, Books, Journals Thesis, Project Reports, Back Volume of Journals, Video Lessons from NPTEL. The library has been using an integrated library management software package with all modules for automated library operation and Bar code system.A well equipped Digital Library is one of the most important sections of the Library. The library being a member of AICTE-INDEST consortium under the aegis of the Ministry of Human Resource and Development provides online access to IEL/IEEE, ASME, ACSE, Science Direct and DOAJ Journals through DELNET. The Digital Library consists of Video Lessons of NPTEL from IIT’s, E-Journals and E-Databases.The Library has 9,200 titles, 34,000 volumes, 130 national journals, 70 international journals and a digital library in which students can access 240 IEEE journals and 600 other journals through the Springer Science+Business Media Engineering Data Unit.

reviews.review_heading: Pros and cons of Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering by me.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure in our college are good enough, and the labs and classrooms are well-maintained. The hostel food facilities are okay for minimal prices, and they provide good medical facilities and encourage students for sports and games in our mechanical department. A madam named keerthi, she teaches us the C language and the mechanical subject. She is very supportive of students by guiding them.

reviews.review_heading: The problems and facilities in Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good enough, but facilities are a little low. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good with minimal prices, and the quantity of food is also good. Sports and games are also given priority. Separate hours will be provided for that, tournaments will also be conducted, and students are also interested in participating.

reviews.review_heading: The opportunities provided by Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering are one of the best things. The labs in our college are well maintained with the best machines and equipment. The college has Wi-Fi availability, classrooms are well maintained, and each class has a separate projector. The infrastructure of GVPCE is quite better compared with other colleges. They provide quality food in the college canteen and hostel mess. We can get unlimited food at the college hostel for only 50 rupees per plate....

reviews.review_heading: Good, based on trending market companies, are selected.
reviews.review_text: In labs, computers are old models but recently they might be focused on labs because it was not an issue because the labs are good. Coming to the network issue, there are no network issues at all and coming to the lab infrastructure, it is also good, and labs consist of AC also.

reviews.review_heading: It has very good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college are very good. It will maintain classrooms and labs very neatly. They also update the new mechanism in labs. There are the latest computers to use and learn for a better experience. We can use Wi-Fi. There is also a gym facility, so we can enjoy it.

reviews.review_heading: I got a satisfying experience at Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The campus of Gayatri Vidya Parishad College of Engineering is spacious and green, which creates a peaceful study atmosphere. As a CSE student, I spend most of my time in labs and classrooms. Both facilities are well-maintained. Some classrooms even have projectors. The library is big and quiet, one of my favorite places. We also have seminar halls, sports areas, a medical room, and transport. The infrastructure supports academics very well, and it definitely adds to the college experience. Faci...

reviews.review_heading: The vibes of GVPCE are at their peak.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in our college are really good. The mechanical department has all the required equipment and machines, and they are maintained very well. The quality of facilities in our hostel is also good. I am not a hostel student. Many of my friends are hostelers, and they share their experiences with me. The canteen food is also good enough, so we can eat unlimited food at Rs. 50 for a single late.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very nice and peaceful in our college. It is full of stress. Surroundings are filled with greenery. Labs and classrooms are okay. Hostels are also good, but there won't be non-vegetarian food in college. In the hostel and college labs, the Wi-Fi facility is available.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are less than before. The attending companies require less people.
reviews.review_text: It has Wi-Fi signal for labs and classrooms. Library is good. The food in the canteen is available but it needs to improve the food items. The facilities are also good in the hostel. The outing timings are also perfect. The area that is specified for sports is excellent. Medical facility is also excellent, and the response is immediate.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review by a CSE graduate of the 2026 batch.
reviews.review_text: Our labs are good, with decent Wi-Fi and systems in the computer labs. Physics and Chemistry labs also have good equipment. The canteen is quiet, but only vegetarian food is available. We have a decent library with digital facilities and around 40 systems, though the infrastructure is less compared to top colleges.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for studies.
reviews.review_text: The college has great Wi-Fi, and we have many books in the library. By giving our library card, we can keep a book for 15 -20 days. The food in the canteen and hostel is good. The college has a big ground. We can play all kinds of sports, like football, volleyball, etc, but not skating.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in Visakhapatnam.
reviews.review_text: There are labs for the civil department, like structural, geotechnical, fluid mechanics, concrete technology, transportation, environment, surveying, and geology. There is Wi-Fi in the library and classrooms. It has a modern library with books, journals, NPTEL videos, digital resources, and a barcode system.

reviews.review_heading: The college has very good placements from 2020 to 2025.
reviews.review_text: The college has lawns and Wi-Fi for internet access. Libraries are available, and the hostel is good, but it is fully vegetarian. The college provides its own data center for network use, which is very useful for students.

reviews.review_heading: I am fully satisfied with joining this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good. Wi-Fi is very fast in our labs. In our labs, every system and machine works properly and gives accurate results. Our college library is very good. Hostel facility is good. Food is average. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are excellent.

reviews.review_heading: The beauty of Gayatri Vidya Parishad.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is very good. Every classroom is very neat and clean. We also have a library which consists of different types of textbooks so that students can read in their free time. We also have a hostel for boys and girls separately.

review_content.General: The facilities and infrastructure available for my department include exclusive labs for Data Science. There are department-specific books available in the library, and there are separate classrooms for our branch. Medical facilities in the college are good. Sports and games are available in our college, and competitions are conducted two or three times a year. I live in a PG, but according to my friends who live in the hostel, the quality of food is average, while the canteen food is above average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The best recommended college in Hyderabad is SNIST.

review_content.Placements: I am currently in my 2nd year of B.Tech in CSE Cyber Security. Placements wise our college has very good placements. 50 percent of the students are placed this year. The average package offered is around 4 5 LPA and the highest package is around 16 LPA. Companies like Cognizant, Infosys, Accenture and many more have visited our college for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides very good classrooms, libraries and labs that are well equipped. We also have a college hostel but it is in Ghatkesar. They provide a college bus to the students who stay in the campus hostel. Coming to the campus hostel facilities they provide very spacious rooms with 4 beds and 2 beds. The food menu changes every day. The breakfast in this hostel is delicious. They even have a small canteen. They do not have a sports room but they have a very big ground in front of the hostel itself.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Same as other colleges, it is not anything special.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students will get placed. If you have backlogs there is no chance of getting placed. Many companies have come to the college and there will be a chance for students in all branches to get placed either in the IT sector, Non IT or in their respective branch oriented jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is nice and clean but just a bit small. There is Wi-Fi available everywhere in the college as well as equipped labs and libraries. The college has many clubs to choose from you can chose from and the food in the canteen is also good but of less quantity like every other college.

faqs.answer: The answer to this question depends on the course applied by the candidate. Those seeking admission in BTech programme of Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology must have a valid score in TS EAMCET for admission. JNTUH on behalf of TSCHE conducts TS EAMCET at state-level once in a year in computer-based mode. Aspirants do not require TS EAMCET for admission to any other programme offered at SNIST.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get admission at Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology without TS EAMCET score?

faqs.answer: The TS EAMCET Counselling 2025 will be conducted in three phases, namely Phase 1, Phase 2, and the Final Phase, for admission into BE/BTech/BPharma courses by the Telangana State Council of Higher Education (TSCHE) and will be managed by Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad (JNTUH). Further, TS EAMCET (now TS EAPCET) Spot Round will also be conducted for Private Unaided Engineering Colleges.

review_summary.college_name: SNIST Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: I am hoping for good placements in the future.

content.Placements: I am the fresher, so I need to wait and watch till last year. The highest package offered is 16 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 8 LPA in my course. Companies like Amazon, Wipro, Infosys, IBM, Capgemini, Deloitte, etc., visit the college for placements. The placement rate is 78-84 percent. Roles are offered based on skills.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are extraordinary. We have well-equipped labs, various department labs, and good classrooms. The library is huge, and we spend a great time in the library. The hostel facility is available for both girls and boys. The food is okay. Sports and games are superb. There is a huge ground. Indoor and outdoor games are also available here.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good for events and fest.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in my course is around 85–90 percent. The highest, lowest, and average packages offered in my course are around 12 LPA, 3.5 LPA, and 6 LPA. The top recruiting companies for my course are Amazon, Deloitte, Infosys, etc. The percentage of students who got internships from my course is greater than 70 percent, with companies like Skillcraft Technology, etc. The top roles offered in my course include data analyst, data scientist, and data engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for my department include exclusive labs for Data Science. There are department-specific books available in the library, and there are separate classrooms for our branch. Medical facilities in the college are good. Sports and games are available in our college, and competitions are conducted two or three times a year. I live in a PG, but according to my friends who live in the hostel, the quality of food is average, while the canteen food is above average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The best recommended college in Hyderabad is SNIST.

content.Placements: I am currently in my 2nd year of B.Tech in CSE Cyber Security. Placements wise our college has very good placements. 50 percent of the students are placed this year. The average package offered is around 4 5 LPA and the highest package is around 16 LPA. Companies like Cognizant, Infosys, Accenture and many more have visited our college for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides very good classrooms, libraries and labs that are well equipped. We also have a college hostel but it is in Ghatkesar. They provide a college bus to the students who stay in the campus hostel. Coming to the campus hostel facilities they provide very spacious rooms with 4 beds and 2 beds. The food menu changes every day. The breakfast in this hostel is delicious. They even have a small canteen. They do not have a sports room but they have a very big ground in front of the hostel itself.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Same as other colleges, it is not anything special.

content.Placements: Most of the students will get placed. If you have backlogs there is no chance of getting placed. Many companies have come to the college and there will be a chance for students in all branches to get placed either in the IT sector, Non IT or in their respective branch oriented jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The college is nice and clean but just a bit small. There is Wi-Fi available everywhere in the college as well as equipped labs and libraries. The college has many clubs to choose from you can chose from and the food in the canteen is also good but of less quantity like every other college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, and strong placement opportunities.

content.Placements: I am from the CSE course at Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology. In my passing out batch, around 75-80 percent of students got placed. The average package is around 6 LPA-8 LPA, with recruiters like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, and a few other companies offering roles such as software developer and engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The CSE department has well-equipped computer labs, Wi-Fi-enabled smart boards, and a central library with good digital sources. The hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms, a hygienic mess and canteen food, basic medical facilities, and good sports and game infrastructures.

admission_overview.college_name: SNIST Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

admission_process.title: SNIST Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SNIST admissionsare entrance-based. The institute considers scores of the aspirants in TS EAMCET, TS PGECET, GATE and TS ICET for admission to specific programmes. The institute also offers admission under Management Quota.Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technologyoffers courses at UG and PG levels in Engineering and Management streams. Aspirants can apply online for any of the accepted entrance exams for admission at SNIST.

SNIST offers admission to courses under Category A and Category B. The seats under Category B are filled through the Management Quota. Aspirants applying for admission at SNIST must fulfil the eligibility criteria for the preferred course. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 and graduation is required for PG programmes. Below areSNIST coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Note:In the absence of information, generic eligibility is taken for MTech.
Download:SNIST Admission Process
SNIST Fee Structure

SNIST admissionsare currently open for 2025 session. The institute offers seats to candidates under Convener and Management Quota. Admission to all the courses is done as per the relevant rules of the government and norms/ guidelines of the Telangana State Council of Higher Education. Below are the steps to get a seat in the institute:
Step 1: SNIST Application Process 2025

Candidates have to fill out the application form for TS EAMCET for BTech, TS PGECET/ GATE for MTech and TS ICET for MBA. After filling out the application forms, aspirants have to appear for the entrance exam accepted for their course.
Step 2:Entrance Exam

Candidates have to appear for TS EAMCET for BTech programme. For MTech, aspirants can get admission based on their GATE or TS PGECET scores. Admission to MBA is based on TS ICET scores of the aspirants. Once the results of the respective entrance exam is out, candidates need to apply for counselling.
Step 3: Counselling

Aspirants have to apply for the counselling conducted for the accepted entrance exam for the applied course. Candidates have to register online at EAMCET website for BTech programme by paying an application fee of INR 500 (INR 250 for reserved category).
Step 4: Seat Allotment

Once the counselling process, the seats are alloted to candidates based on their entrance exam scores, course and college preference. Out of the total, 70% of seats are offered under Category -A (Convener Quota) and 30% under Category-B (Management Quota). Once the seat is alloted, aspirants have to report at the campus for document verification. Selected candidates also need to pay theSNIST feeto confirm their seat.

courses_data.description: Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology offers BTech for four years at the UG level. The course is spread across eight semesters. The institute offers BTech in various specialisations such as Civil,Mechanical,Computer Science, IT,Electrical & Electronics Engineering, etc. Aspirants who have completed Class 12 with Physics,Chemistryand Mathematics are eligible to apply for BTech. Besides, the institute also offers lateral entry to BTech programme.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for BTech at Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: Aspirants who have completed Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics are eligible to apply for Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology BTech programme. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission. Besides, candidates must also have a valid score in TS EAMCET for admission to BTech course.

faqs.question: Does Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology offer lateral entry to BTech?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology offers lateral entry to the BTech course. Candidates who have completed their Diploma in Engineering/ Technology can apply for lateral entry. Seats up to 10% of the sanctioned intake of each programme of UG courses shall be filled by the Convener, TS ECET as lateral entry admission into second-year of the BTech course.

faqs.question: Which are the BTech specilisations offered at Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology offers four-year BTech programme at the UG level. Aspirants who have completed Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics are eligible to apply for the course. Below are the BTech specialisations offered at SNIST:CivilMechanicalComputer ScienceInformation TechnologyElectrical & ElectronicsElectronics & Computer Engineering, etc.

faqs.question: What is the TS EAMCET Round 1 cutoff for BTech at Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology for other than general categories?
faqs.answer: The year 2023 cutoff ranks for B.Tech. in Civil Engineering at SNIST - Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology other than General category are - 114496 for SC. While the admissions are based on the scores/rank obtained in TSEAMCET, the last cut offs also change a lot depending on All India quota or Home State. It also varies if the applicant is a female.

courses_data.name: SNIST MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology offers MBA for two years at the PG level. The programme is spread across four semesters. The selection for the MBA course is based on the TS ICET scores of the aspirants. Besides, candidates must also pass a bachelor's degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate for OC and 45% aggregate for others to apply for the MBA programme at SNIST.

faqs.question: Is entrance exam accepted for MBA admission at Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology considers scores in TS ICET for admission to MBA programme. The seats are allotted to aspirants based on their TS ICET rank. Out of the total seats in MBA,  70% of seats are filled under Convener Quota. Remaining 30% of seats are filled through Management Quota.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for MBA at Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: Aspirants who have passed bachelor's degree with at least 50% aggregate for OC (45% aggregate for others) can apply for Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology MBA programme. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: How much is the fee for MBA at Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology MBA isINR 1.70 lakh. The fee is calcuated considering the annual fee of MBA. Candidates who are selected for admission need to pay the fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat. Aspirants must pay the fee within the specified time to avoid cancellation of admission.

faqs.question: What is the TS EAMCET Round 1 cut off for BTech in CSE at SNIST?
faqs.answer: For 2023, cut off was 4095 for General category candidates in All India quota for B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering at  Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology (SNIST). For female candidates in general category under All India quota,  4573 was the closing rank. B.Tech cut off varies depending on the category and domicile/quota of the applicant.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology offers admission based on entrance exam scores of the candidates. The institute considers TS EAMCET scores for BTech. Admission to MBA and M.Tech courses is based on TS ICET and GATE/ TS PGECET scores. Out of the total,  70% seats are offered to aspirants under the Covener Quota. Remaining 30% seats are offered under the Management Quota.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology without TS EAMCET score?
faqs.answer: The answer to this question depends on the course applied by the candidate. Those seeking admission in BTech programme of Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology must have a valid score in TS EAMCET for admission. JNTUH on behalf of TSCHE conducts TS EAMCET at state-level once in a year in computer-based mode. Aspirants do not require TS EAMCET for admission to any other programme offered at SNIST.

faqs.question: Is entrance exam required for admission at Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates need to pass any of the accepted entrance exams for admission at Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology. The institute accepts scores in TS EAMCET, TS PGECET/ GATE, TS ICET for BTech, M.Tech and MBA programmes, respectively. Aspirants seeking admission in BTech through lateral entry have to pass TS ECET. Candidates are allotted seat based on their entrance exam score through counselling.

faqs.question: Is there Management Quota at Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology offers admission under Management Quota (Category-B) in all the offered courses. Out of the total, admission in 30% seats in through Management Quota. The seats are filled by Management as per the rules issued by the Government and guidelines from time to time issued by TSCHE.

college_info.college_name: SNIST Scholarship Details

paragraphs: SNIST offers a diverse range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels, mainly in the field of Engineering and Business Management. The college offers a M.Tech programme to students for a ranging betweeen INR 2.1 Lacs and INR 3 lakh. Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology courses are AICTE-approved and are offered to students in full-time mode.
The TS EAMCET application fee is as follows:

The total tuition fee for Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology MBA is INR 1.70 lakh. The fee is calcuated considering the annual fee of MBA. Candidates who are selected for admission need to pay the fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat. Aspirants must pay the fee within the specified time to avoid cancellation of admission.

Sreenidhi Institute of Science and Technology students can apply for scholarships offered by Central or State Governments. There are merit and need-based scholarships provided by the government. Students can register on the government's website for the scholarship provided they fulfil the criteria.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: SKIT Jaipur offers full-time BTech at the UG level, MTech and MBA at the PG level and PhD at the doctorate level. All the Engineering programmes are accredited by the National Board of Accreditation (NBA). While BTech is offered in eight specialisations, MTech is offered in seven specialisations only. The course duration of BTech and MTech is four and two years. Below mentioned are the important highlights regarding SKIT Jaipur courses, along with eligibility and fees:

Computers are of the latest Windows, and we have Wi-Fi in every computer lab. Hostels have both facilities, AC and non-AC. The rent for hostel is reasonable.

review_summary.college_name: SKIT Jaipur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Placements here are good as compared to others.

content.Placements: Our course is B.Tech in the artificial intelligence branch. Our batch consists of sixty students, where we have around eleven subjects, including 5 to 6 theory subjects and 5 to 6 lab subjects. Some theory subjects are easy, while others are hard.
content.Infrastructure: Our hostel consists of 460 rooms, where each room has a single bed. There are eight rooms on one floor. The hostel is six floors high, and each floor contains ten washrooms and five bathrooms. We have four wardens who take care of the boys in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: SKIT honest review based on recent update.

content.Placements: This year like a lot of placements, there are a lot with average package of 5 LPA. Top companies like IBM, Infosys, and TCS came and picked students according to skills and with good roles. Our college does not provide a stipend internship, but we have training internships.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are available such as a canteen, sports, and a nearby medical shop but the infrastructure is average and you wont get the 5 star facility. The chair in CS block is comfortable and restful. The hostel is okay, option for a nearby PG or flat if available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Overall, college is study focused.

content.Placements: 60 to 70 percent of students are placed this year. The highest package offered is around 21 LPA, the lowest package offered is 3 LPA, and the average package offered is around 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Justpay, IBM, and Infosys. Approximately 80 to 85 percent of students got internship, some of which are paid and others are unpaid.
content.Infrastructure: The environment or infrastructure is well-maintained in our college. Our CSE department is well-maintained in the college. Computers are of the latest Windows, and we have Wi-Fi in every computer lab. Hostels have both facilities, AC and non-AC. The rent for hostel is reasonable.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Overall, our college is well-maintained.

content.Placements: Around 60–70% students are placed this year. The highest package is around 21 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is around 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Juspay, IBM, and Infosys. Approximately 80–85% students get internships. Some are paid, and others are unpaid.
content.Infrastructure: The environment and infrastructure are well-maintained at our college. Our CSE department is well-maintained. Computers are the latest Windows version and have Wi-Fi in every computer lab. The hostel has both AC and non-AC. The rent of the hostel is reasonable.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: This college is for those students who want to focus on their engineering life

content.Placements: Around 50–60 percent of students are placed in my college from the passing out batch, and most of them are from the CSE Department. The highest package is around 21 LPA, the average is around 5 LPA, and the lowest is around 3.4 LPA. Some companies are there like Juspay, etc. Most students got internships, some are paid, and some are unpaid.
content.Infrastructure: In my college, SKIT, there are well-maintained facilities and infrastructure. Classrooms are neat and clean, well arranged. The library is well maintained with a variety of books and separate rooms to study. For your laptop work, there is a separate room to study, and for your college work, there is a room where computers are provided with internet.

admission_process.title: SKIT Jaipur Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Swami Keshvanand Institute of Technology, Management & Gramothan admission 2025is currently open. The college offers BTech, MTech and MBA courses at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the institute also offers PhD courses.SKIT College Jaipuris affiliated withRajasthan Technical University. Candidates are selected on various national-level entrance exam scores for various courses as per respective courses. Overall the college offers more than ten courses (including specialisations) in the streams of Engineering and Management Studies.SKIT Jaipur course admissionsapplication process is a mix of both online and offline. Read the following article to know more aboutSKIT College Jaipur course admission2025.

The mode of study atSKIT College Jaipurcourses is full-time. Some of the popular programmes ofSKIT College Jaipurare BTech, MTech, MBA. Candidates can read the table below to learn more onSwami Keshvanand Institute of Technology admission 2025criteria from the table presented below:

SKIT Jaipur course admissionis based on entrance exam scores followed by the counselling body as per respective courses. Further, the institute also offers BTech Lateral Entry courses. BTech-Seats are to be allotted by the REAP-2025 based on the merit of rank/percentile obtained in JEE (Main)Exam 2025 (having JEE (Main) 2025 percentile greater or equal to 20)/ Percentage in Class 12 / D.Voc stream. Students can also check the detailedREAP counselling applicationform here.

MTech- The centralised online counselling for admission in first-year MTech courses is conducted by the coordinator, CAM ( Centralised Admission for MTech). Priority will be given to valid GATE score candidates. Check the detailedGATE Application fromhere.
