hostel_campus.college_name: SKIT Jaipur Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: Login and fill up the application form with all the details to start the process
Upload the accepted documents & pay INR 700 as application fees. Th

reviews.review_heading: Placements here are good as compared to others.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel consists of 460 rooms, where each room has a single bed. There are eight rooms on one floor. The hostel is six floors high, and each floor contains ten washrooms and five bathrooms. We have four wardens who take care of the boys in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: SKIT honest review based on recent update.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are available such as a canteen, sports, and a nearby medical shop but the infrastructure is average and you wont get the 5 star facility. The chair in CS block is comfortable and restful. The hostel is okay, option for a nearby PG or flat if available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, college is study focused.
reviews.review_text: The environment or infrastructure is well-maintained in our college. Our CSE department is well-maintained in the college. Computers are of the latest Windows, and we have Wi-Fi in every computer lab. Hostels have both facilities, AC and non-AC. The rent for hostel is reasonable.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our college is well-maintained.
reviews.review_text: The environment and infrastructure are well-maintained at our college. Our CSE department is well-maintained. Computers are the latest Windows version and have Wi-Fi in every computer lab. The hostel has both AC and non-AC. The rent of the hostel is reasonable.

reviews.review_heading: This college is for those students who want to focus on their engineering life
reviews.review_text: In my college, SKIT, there are well-maintained facilities and infrastructure. Classrooms are neat and clean, well arranged. The library is well maintained with a variety of books and separate rooms to study. For your laptop work, there is a separate room to study, and for your college work, there is a room where computers are provided with internet.

reviews.review_heading: I am highly satisfied with placements, infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: We have a great infrastructure available for my course, especially with many labs for coding. In the library, we have a different section no. 4, and is only for CS students. College has decent mess and quality food, and the canteen food is great, and we upgrade sports facilities, and their extracurricular activities happen after some days to days.

reviews.review_heading: My journey as a SKIT fresher.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is not provided, and there are a lot of internet problems. Labs and the library are good, and classrooms are a little outdated. The hostel provides facilities like sports and different clubs like S&T, Toastmasters, and there is an incubation centre, which is a great initiative. Every Wednesday is assigned for activities.

reviews.review_heading: College is mediocre but good for low percentile students.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are average, you get limited Wi-Fi that is approximately 3 GB only, and sometimes the Wi-Fi signal is not available, usually in the basement area. The food quality is average, and the hygiene is medium. There is a food timetable which is followed, and you get 4 meals per day.

reviews.review_heading: Average but good for the low percentile.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are average, they provide limited Wi-Fi in the hostel and campus, around 3 GB/day. The library is good, but it is always crowded. Mess food is okayish, which means it is better than PGS nearby, but it's too boring to eat the same food sometimes they make the same dishes better, and sometimes they don't.

reviews.review_heading: Very strict college.
reviews.review_text: I'm a day scholar, but from my friends I got to know that the hostel is good and clean. The washrooms are hygienic, and the food is good too. You won't get very good food, but it's bearable. Wi-Fi facility is available with a good range. Overall, the ambience and rooms are good.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty are highly educated and good in behaviour.
reviews.review_text: The labs are very well managed by their respective teacher. The classrooms are highly maintained and are well-furnished. There are projectors in many classrooms. The quality of food in the mess is good, and the library is also maintained. The classroom quality is good and well-furnished.

reviews.review_heading: College life is once in a lifetime experience.
reviews.review_text: Everything is present AC rooms, non-AC rooms, the food is good, and Wi-Fi is also available, but there is a limit of 3 GB per day. Classrooms are great, faculty members are awesome in behavior, and great sports. So that’s all that is required for you to know.

reviews.review_heading: The college campus is small. College life is boring. More oriented in study.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available, but with a limit. Labs are good. The best thing is the SKIT library, where you will get all the study material for your exams, and the environment is also good for studying. In classrooms, there are no AC in B.Teach courses. Sports facilities are also average. You can play some games here, like cricket, basketball, badminton, and football, but the grounds are not that great. There is a gym in college, but you will be charged for that.

reviews.review_heading: Focused on studies but a hectic schedule.
reviews.review_text: Only modern infrastructure is library, classrooms are decent but look old, new building is under construction. There are 3 grounds (volleyball, football, and kabbadi), 3 gardens (small in size), a tennis court, a badminton court, and an in-house gym. This college is bigger than PIET and JECRC foundation.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Swami Keshvanand Institute of Technology Management and Gramothan, Jaipur.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in this course. The infrastructure of this college is so nice. Only Wi-Fi is not available, but all other things are present in this course. The canteen food is so nice. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games are also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: My review of this college.

review_content.Placements: Placements are good here. Our regular recruiters are DE Shaw, Arcesium, Barclays, PWC, RBS, Bank of America, Deloitte, EY, KPMG, Bira, and many others. Various profiles that are offered here include investor relations, Financial Reporting, Management company accounting, Tax, Compliance, Management Reporting, Risk Analytics, etc. The highest package is 28 LPA. The average package is 9 LPA. There are different grounds of interview as well as some group discussions conducted, based on which students get placed into the recruitment with the package offering. Almost 70 percent of students get placed every year. There is also a separate placement cell.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Design - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Academics and industry readiness at MET BKC. A balanced perspective.

review_content.Placements: At MET BKC Institute of Technology, almost all students get interview opportunities, but less than 10% crack them. The highest package is around 2-3 LPA, and while placements are limited, students can improve their chances through strong skills and off-campus applications. Nearly all students secure internships, which help in gaining experience, though job roles vary. To boost employability, students should focus on DSA, backed technologies Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, and interview preparation. With the right skills and projects, better opportunities can be secured beyond campus placements.

overview_faqs.question: Is MET League of Colleges, Bhujbal Knowledge City, Nashik a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: MET League of Colleges, Bhujbal Knowledge City, Nashik is a reputed institute for PG Diploma, After 1th Diploma, D.Pharma, B.Tech, B.Pharma, Pharm.D, M.E./M.Tech, M.Pharma, MBA/PGDM, MCA. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Hospitality & Travel, IT & Software, Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. MET League of Colleges, Bhujbal Knowledge City, Nashik has a review rating of 4.1 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.5 on campuslife, 3.6 on placements, 4.1 on faculty and 4.5 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: MET League of Colleges, Bhujbal Knowledge City, Nashik Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Design - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Excellent infrastructure with great sports and placement opportunities.

content.Placements: Placements are quite good at MET Bhujabal Knowledge City. Reputed companies like Tata Motors, Netwin, and Winjit visit our campus. Roles offered are usually Software Engineer, Data Science, and Data Analyst. The average package is around 4 LPA-5 LPA. The placement cell is very supportive and helps us with mock interviews.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is massive and very green. The engineering department has a huge 2-floor library, and every department has its own separate library. Security is very strict, no entry is allowed without an ID card, which makes the campus very safe. We have excellent facilities for cricket, basketball, gym, volleyball, chess, and badminton. Canteen food is too good and adorable.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2031
individual_reviews.title: It has average placements, not top-tier, and can be considered.

content.Placements: It is the first batch under SPPU that has not passed out yet. So the exact placement can not yet be determined. But after evaluating other courses and branches, a strong estimation can be made. The highest package is 6 LPA-7 LPA, and the average package of 3 LPA-4 LPA can be expected.
content.Infrastructure: From the surface, the college campus is outstanding with good vegetation and biodiversity, with different species of plants and birds. However, the individual building's cleanliness can still be improved. In terms of aesthetics, washrooms can be clearer. Hostel rooms are identical to flats rather than a single room.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My review of this college.

content.Placements: Placements are good here. Our regular recruiters are DE Shaw, Arcesium, Barclays, PWC, RBS, Bank of America, Deloitte, EY, KPMG, Bira, and many others. Various profiles that are offered here include investor relations, Financial Reporting, Management company accounting, Tax, Compliance, Management Reporting, Risk Analytics, etc. The highest package is 28 LPA. The average package is 9 LPA. There are different grounds of interview as well as some group discussions conducted, based on which students get placed into the recruitment with the package offering. Almost 70 percent of students get placed every year. There is also a separate placement cell.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Design - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Academics and industry readiness at MET BKC. A balanced perspective.

content.Placements: At MET BKC Institute of Technology, almost all students get interview opportunities, but less than 10% crack them. The highest package is around 2-3 LPA, and while placements are limited, students can improve their chances through strong skills and off-campus applications. Nearly all students secure internships, which help in gaining experience, though job roles vary. To boost employability, students should focus on DSA, backed technologies Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, and interview preparation. With the right skills and projects, better opportunities can be secured beyond campus placements.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college has a good campus and placements.

content.Placements: The MET college offers a decent placement in Nashik city compared to other colleges. The college tries its best to provide companies and give students placements. Top recruiters are Wipro, Infosys, etc. The top salary package offered is 21 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college has the best infrastructure and campus in Nashik compared to other colleges. The campus is well-maintainedd and clean every day. The college has also its hostel and canteen. The hostel is outside of campus. The college is good in all aspects.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure with great sports and placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The campus is massive and very green. The engineering department has a huge 2-floor library, and every department has its own separate library. Security is very strict, no entry is allowed without an ID card, which makes the campus very safe. We have excellent facilities for cricket, basketball, gym, volleyball, chess, and badminton. Canteen food is too good and adorable.

reviews.review_heading: It has average placements, not top-tier, and can be considered.
reviews.review_text: From the surface, the college campus is outstanding with good vegetation and biodiversity, with different species of plants and birds. However, the individual building's cleanliness can still be improved. In terms of aesthetics, washrooms can be clearer. Hostel rooms are identical to flats rather than a single room.

reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel provides a lot of facilities including public to private facilities for both males and females. The dorms and washrooms are maintained and kept clean here. They also provide laundry service, medical services, and safety. The quality of food is healthy and they serve it 4 times a day in a specific time slot. The hostel facilities along with the fees are highly cost-effective and convenient as well.

reviews.review_heading: Academics and industry readiness at MET BKC. A balanced perspective.
reviews.review_text: All the basic facilities are available, and the library is the best part of our college. We have a sports room and a gym. We also have a canteen that offers a variety of foods, and it is good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a good campus and placements.
reviews.review_text: The college has the best infrastructure and campus in Nashik compared to other colleges. The campus is well-maintainedd and clean every day. The college has also its hostel and canteen. The hostel is outside of campus. The college is good in all aspects.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college to take admission in Nashik.
reviews.review_text: The college has a big library, sports room, computer labs, clean washrooms, digital boards in the classroom, good benches, greenery, and a well-equipped canteen. Hostels are quite good. The food is decent. We have a canteen and sports rooms. The hostel has good security so parents don't have to worry about their children.

reviews.review_heading: The college is excellent. I recommended others to get an admission.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. The campus has a new architecture building. All campus has greenery. They have an staff for maintaining the campus. The hostel is good. The hostel facilities are good. The hostel buildings are new.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college and campus.
reviews.review_text: MET has the best-ever infrastructure and campus in Nashik. The campus is very cool with greenery. The campus is well-maintained and cleaned. Everyday campus also has a canteen and water purifier. The campus is located away from the city which was a calm environment.

The hostel canteen is the biggest, and the food tastes excellent. The hostel also provides Wi-Fi.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The poor campus life but fine education.

review_content.Placements: There is no placement in B.Arch at DCRUST. Our university does not provide any placement on the campus. No companies recruit architects from this university. Students have to find internships for their practical training on their own. But all the students get a guaranteed internship in well-reputed architectural firms and companies due to the good reputation of the university around Northern India.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has poor infrastructure and zero maintenance. There are non accessible roads. It has drainage problems and no 24X7 drinking water supply. They have installed solar panels around the campus but they are not operational. We still have to struggle with electricity facilities. Hostel is the poorest thing in the whole university. If you have money, do not prefer taking a hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is the best college in Delhi NCR.

review_content.Placements: 70% of students were placed in your course. 450,000 is the highest average package offered in our college by a multinational company for the course. 70 percent of students got internships from your course in a multinational company. Many companies come to our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities and infrastructure are available for all the courses and departments. Well-quality and fully airy labs are well managed, and healthy food is available in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities, sports and games, and good facilities for the hostel are also provided.

overview_faqs.question: Does DCRUST Sonepat charge any application fee?
overview_faqs.answer: Students willing to submit their application for admission at DCRUST can do so online. Students must note that the application fee can be paid in online mode only via State Bank Collect. The University will not accept any mode of payment. For general category students who are applying for admission at DCRUST are required to pay INR 1000 as an application fee. Students from a reserved category, who are willing to apply for admission at DCRUST Sonepat are required to pay INR 250. The application fee for counselling for BTech and BArch courses at DCRUST Sonepat is INR 1000.

review_summary.college_name: DCRUST Sonepat Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Aeronautical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for engineering.

content.Placements: I am part of the 2023-24 batch of this course. About 70-80 percent of students get placed. The package offered ranges from 3-8 LPA. The average package offered is 4.5 LPA. Top recruiters include reputed industry companies. 70 percent of students got internships in well-known organisations.
content.Infrastructure: The department has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, a good library, and a Wi-Fi campus. The hostel facilities are clean and comfortable. Mess and canteen food are decent. Basic medical care, sports grounds, and indoor games are also available for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Good college with good knowledge.

content.Placements: Almost 95 out of 100 students were placed in my course and others moved to further studies. The highest package in my course was 20 LPA and the lowest package was 24 LPA. Top recruiting companies in my course are TCS, Infosys, HCL, etc. Almost 90 out of 100 students got internships in my course. Software engineer, tester, etc. roles were offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: Good facilities are available in Puran Murti campus and very good infrastructure is available for my course. Best computer labs for coding. Best computers with good processing speed. All books are available in the library. Good facilities are available in the hostel. Daily new variety of food is available. I like that.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The poor campus life but fine education.

content.Placements: There is no placement in B.Arch at DCRUST. Our university does not provide any placement on the campus. No companies recruit architects from this university. Students have to find internships for their practical training on their own. But all the students get a guaranteed internship in well-reputed architectural firms and companies due to the good reputation of the university around Northern India.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has poor infrastructure and zero maintenance. There are non accessible roads. It has drainage problems and no 24X7 drinking water supply. They have installed solar panels around the campus but they are not operational. We still have to struggle with electricity facilities. Hostel is the poorest thing in the whole university. If you have money, do not prefer taking a hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Our college is the best college in Delhi NCR.

content.Placements: 70% of students were placed in your course. 450,000 is the highest average package offered in our college by a multinational company for the course. 70 percent of students got internships from your course in a multinational company. Many companies come to our college.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities and infrastructure are available for all the courses and departments. Well-quality and fully airy labs are well managed, and healthy food is available in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities, sports and games, and good facilities for the hostel are also provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I like my college a lot, and I assume that others will like it too, as it's a worthwhile college.

content.Placements: I am currently in my 2nd year, and I have a long way to go for placement. As for our seniors, I heard they have been placed in different companies. There was a campus drive when I was in my first year, too. I think at least 80% of them got placed in multiple companies. There are multiple roles offered by the companies to our seniors, and they are also training us for those roles.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the campus is to my liking as it has lots of greenery, a few big grounds, and many smaller ones. Although I didn't opt for a hostel, when I visited my friend, I noticed that the hostel was Wi-Fi equipped. Rooms were clean, and bathrooms were good. The food was to my liking, too.

admission_process.title: DCRUST Sonepat Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Deenbandhu Chhotu Ram University of Science and Technologyadmissionis primarily entrance-based. The university provides various programmes in the fields of Management, Technology, Science, Architecture, and more. These courses are provided across multiple specialisations. Popularly known asDCRUST, the university accepts the national-level entrance exams for admissions. DCRUST also conducts its entrance tests for admission. Interested students can read the following article to learn about the courses, eligibility, scholarships, fees, and admission procedure forDeenbandhu Chhotu Ram University of Science and Technology.

The university offers more than 50 courses via its 16 teaching departments under 8 faculties. The admission and application process of the university commences online. Interested students can refer to the following table to know about the DCRUST admission highlights:
DCRUST Sonepat Admission 2025 Highlights
Mode of study
Full-time/ Regular mode
Programmes offered
15+ across several specialisations
How to apply
Level of programmes offered
UG| PG| Diploma
Popular programmes
MBA| BSc| BTech| MTech
Download brochure

DCRUST Sonepat course admissionis subject to fulfilment of the course-specific admission criteria. The university accepts several national and state-level entrance exams, such as CAT/ JEE Mains, etc. Students are required to participate in the counselling (if applicable) for seat allotment. The university also conducts its entrance tests for admission to its PG and Dual degree programmes with 120 Multiple-choice questions. Candidates with valid eligibility criteria are eligible for the entrance exam. Find below the eligibility and selection criteria for popularDCRUST courses:

DCRUST feesvary fromINR 5,000toINR 10.3 lakh. The total tuition fee is inclusive of several components, such as tuition fees, programme fees, alumni fees, registration fees, library fees, and more. Some of the components are required to be paid at the time of admission, while the remaining can be paid yearly. Candidates must make the fee payment online through the candidate login credentials once they complete the physical admission and counselling. Deenbandhu Chhotu Ram University of Science and Technology admission process is a multi-step procedure. Students can check the detailed admission process below:
Step 1: DCRUST Sonepat Application Process

Candidates must register on the official website of the university with all the credentials. Once registered, candidates can proceed with the online application process. Candidates must pay the application fee online which is activated after the application form is completed.
Step 2: Shortlisting

The application form will be scrutinised as per the course qualification and entrance exam scores. Shortlisted candidates will further proceed with the university-based entrance test. The test is conducted for various PG / Dual Degree Programmes of the university and will be held at the university campus.
Step 3: Merit List

The merit list will be prepared based on the results of the Entrance Test provided by the Controller of Examination to the chairpersons. COE will also provide the details of all the registered candidates.
Step 4: Counselling and Admission

The counselling and admission in a program will be held in the respective department as per the scheduled time. Candidates will be offered provisional admission in order of the rank of merit notified and displayed. If the candidate is not able to deposit the admission fee in the stipulated schedule, then he/she will be considered "not interested" and accordingly such a candidate will not be considered for subsequent counselling. However, if candidates attend the counselling and admission process, they will be finalised for admission.

faqs.answer: Deenbandhu Chhotu Ram University of Science and Technology (DCRUST) offers a wide range of programmes. faqs.question: What is the tuition fee for the BArch course at DCRUST Sonepat?
faqs.answer: DCRUST Sonepat offers Barch from four different schools which include a Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) from DCRUST - Deenbandhu Chhotu Ram University of Science and Technology, Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) from Gateway College of Architecture and Design, Gateway Education, Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) from PM College of Architecture and Bachelor of Architecture (B.Arch.) from South Point School of Architecture. The total tuition fee of BArch varies. While BArch from DCRUST and Gateway College of Architecture and Design has a total tuition fee of INR 80,000 and INR 3.4 Lacs respectively, the tuition fee of BArch by PM College of Architecture and by South Point School of Architecture is INR 2.2 Lakh.

The total tuition fee for MBA across all specialisations at DURUST Sonepat ranges between INR 75,000 - INR 2.5 lakh. The MBA fee also includes an application fee of INR 1,000 (INR 250 for SC/DSC/BC candidates of Haryana only). DCRUST offers MBA from multiple management schools that come under its affiliations. Business schools having affiliations with DCRUST include South Point Institute of Technology & Management, Delhi Institute Of Technology And Management, Hindu Institute of Management, Bharat Group of Institutions, BIT - Shri Balwant Institute of Technology, and G.V.M. Institute of Technology and Management (GVMITM).

hostel_campus.college_name: DCRUST Sonepat Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: University hostel has a spacious furnished common room with TV and indoor games, newspapers, etc. A billiards room is also functional in boy’s hostel premises. Hostel premises are connected with Wi-Fi. Each hostel has a badminton court,Volley ball court and a table tennis room. Every hostel has a separate Mess cum kitchen unit is available in each hostel. Basic amenities such as water purifiers, bathrooms with geysers and laundry are available. Hostel premises are equipped with CCTV cameras and a security guard is available round the clock.

library.description: The Library houses a rich collection of 54,480 books and other reading materials and 343 e-books. It has subscribed to 101 printed Indian Journals, 67 Magazines and 19 Newspapers. Also subscribed to the Online Journals of J-Gate (Social and Management Science – 6936), Emerald – 150 (Management – 150), EBSCO (Art and Architecture – 239) and IEEE/IEL. For access to online Journals, databases and electronic books the University Library has 32 work stations with a setup of 1 G connectivity. Also has a separate room for Reference Section comprises of Dictionaries, Directories, Handbooks, Encyclopedias, Yearbooks and a copy of a title meant for reference. Seating capacity is of 100 readers at a time. Photocopying, lamination, spiral binding, colored printing facilities are available.Book Bank Facility is available. The Library also has a separate hall for reading and accessing internet for 24*7 hrs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Puran Murti CampusReviewed on 19 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: The department has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, a good library, and a Wi-Fi campus. The hostel facilities are clean and comfortable. Mess and canteen food are decent. Basic medical care, sports grounds, and indoor games are also available for students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2021Offered by Puran Murti CampusReviewed on 19 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Good college with good knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities are available in Puran Murti campus and very good infrastructure is available for my course. Best computer labs for coding. Best computers with good processing speed. All books are available in the library. Good facilities are available in the hostel. Daily new variety of food is available. I like that.

reviews.review_heading: The poor campus life but fine education.
reviews.review_text: Our college has poor infrastructure and zero maintenance. There are non accessible roads. It has drainage problems and no 24X7 drinking water supply. They have installed solar panels around the campus but they are not operational. We still have to struggle with electricity facilities. Hostel is the poorest thing in the whole university. If you have money, do not prefer taking a hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Puran Murti CampusReviewed on 9 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best college in Delhi NCR.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities and infrastructure are available for all the courses and departments. Well-quality and fully airy labs are well managed, and healthy food is available in the mess and canteen. Medical facilities, sports and games, and good facilities for the hostel are also provided.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Puran Murti CampusReviewed on 9 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: I like my college a lot, and I assume that others will like it too, as it's a worthwhile college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus is to my liking as it has lots of greenery, a few big grounds, and many smaller ones. Although I didn't opt for a hostel, when I visited my friend, I noticed that the hostel was Wi-Fi equipped. Rooms were clean, and bathrooms were good. The food was to my liking, too.

reviews.review_heading: My college provides education at a relatively lower cost, but I am dissatisfied with the placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not too bad, not too good. It's quite good because of the greenery on campus. The library is good. First-year classrooms are not good, but second year onwards, you get neat and clean classrooms with AC. Wi-Fi facilities are poor. Mess food is moderate. There are no such medical facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Puran Murti CampusReviewed on 9 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Best college in Sonipat for programming students.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a green environment, great classrooms and the best library. There is no air pollution as the area is full of greenery without any noise pollution. Well-furnished hostels and best quality foods are available. Medical facilities are available in case of an emergency. Food is also provided by the college. For cricket, there is the best ground and an auditorium is also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Puran Murti CampusReviewed on 9 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure, staff, and teachers are really good.
reviews.review_text: I mostly love the infrastructure of my campus. There are smart classes available on campus, proper lighting, false ceilings, proper windows, airy and big rooms are available. Wi-Fi is also available on all floors and offices. All types of books are available in the library. The food in my canteen is very hygienic and tasty.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Puran Murti CampusReviewed on 9 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Education at best- Puran Murti campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. All the labs are well-maintained. They have hangers for three aircraft to be placed. The environment is very good here. This campus is recommended for all students for different courses like B.Tech. Management and pharmacy.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Puran Murti CampusReviewed on 9 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Puran Murti Campus is a Home-like College Where Students Meet Their Expectations.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are extraordinary. The campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled. The labs are equipped with all necessary equipment in all labs, including ECE, EE, Mechanical, Aviation, and CSE. The library includes all books, including the latest editions, and has subscriptions to all journals.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by G.V.M. Institute of Technology and Management (GVMITM)
reviews.review_heading: Average college with decent infrastructure but limited placements and industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities at GVMITM, academic, residential, and lifestyle, are good overall for a practical learning and campus life experience. There is positive student feedback on Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, hostels, and food quality. While a few areas, like medical improvements and regular sports, need attention.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Puran Murti CampusReviewed on 7 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Totally satisfied with infrastructure and faculty of my college.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is equipped with all facilities like Wi-Fi, classrooms, a moot court, and a spacious library. College has a lush green playground with cricket, football, basketball courts, etc. Hostel food is excellent. Medical facilities and doctors are available 24/7.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by G.V.M. Institute of Technology and Management (GVMITM)
reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with GVMITM.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in our college, like Wi-Fi, computer lab, classrooms, and library. Four courses are available, i.e., BBA, MBA, BCA, and MCA. I did not opt for the hostel, so I don't know about hostels. Sports events are conducted yearly, and we have fun.

reviews.review_heading: Good government university with strong academic and average placement.
reviews.review_text: The university has a large green campus with decent infrastructure. Classrooms are spacious, labs are well-equipped for core civil subjects. The library is best with various facilities such as Wi-Fi and more. Basic medical facilities, sports grounds, NCC, and a gym are also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Gateway School of BusinessReviewed on 27 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Moderately satisfied with the faculty, teaching material, and the placements are also satisfiable.
reviews.review_text: There are multiple facilities available in our course, such as several computer labs where each lab is assigned for a different language and subject. Central Wi-Fi is provided all over the college campus with a satisfactory speed. The classrooms are also good and clean. The library is very huge, with a collection of every type of book.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of its sports and extra-curricular activities.

review_content.Placements: Placements are very good and better than other colleges. 100% of placements are provided by our college. Internships are also provided for students in semester holidays. The highest package offered is Rs 45,000 per month and the lowest package is Rs 10,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good and awesome. Classrooms are good and clean benches are provided for sitting. Class has a teaching board with modern technology attached with a projector. Hostel is neat and much better. Mess food is very bad. Wi-Fi is provided for hostel students. Library is also provided for study purposes.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Textile Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty.

review_content.Placements: Almost all the students got placed in the final year. The top CGPA in my class is nine. The highest package provided initially is forty-five thousand per month, which will be increased after one year. The lowest package is ten thousand rupees only. All students can go for internships. The top role is an entrepreneur. Decathlon is the top recruiting company.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not provided in our department, and mobiles are also prohibited during class hours. We can keep our mobiles with us but cannot use them during class hours. The class has a ceiling fan and benches. The teaching board is also available, and a projector is also available, which is very useful for PPT presentations.

admission_process.title: Alagappa College of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Alagappa College of Technology admission 2025 is expected to open soon for all the courses. The institute offers BTech and MTech courses.Alagappa College of Technology, Chennaicarried out the application form online. Admission to BTech is based on the last qualifying exam score, followed by TNEA Counselling. Further, the institute accepts GATE or CEETA entrance exam scores for admission to MTech. All the information related to Alagappa College of Technology admission, course eligibility, and selection criteria is available in the following segments.

Alagappa College of Technology, Chennai (AIT) focuses on offering courses in the field of Information Technology. Alagappa College of Technology admission is entrance-based. The institute is affiliated with Anna Technical University and offers a total of BTech and MTech courses. To get admission candidates are required to fulfil the eligibility and selection criteria set by the college. The below table carries the eligibility and selection details forAlagappa College of Technology courses:

Alagappa College of Technology feeis a sum of various components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, exam fee, etc. Some of the fee components like caution deposit are one-time paid while tuition fee is paid annually. Coming to affordability is one of the strong reasons why many don't opt for a degree or a college. While the availability of education loans and scholarships has made education accessible the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. Check below the total tuition fee and average package for Alagappa College of Technology courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Alagappa College of Technology seat intake varies course-wise. Candidates are offered seats based on their merit. Once the seat is allotted, candidates are required to pay the course fee to confirm their admission. Below is the seat intake for Alagappa College of Technology courses:

Alagappa College of Technology admission process 2025is open for all courses. The institute offers entrance-based admission to all UG and PG courses. Candidates must complete the admission process for admission. Check below theAlagappa College of Technologyadmission process 2025:
Step 1: Application Process 2025
Candidates looking for admission to Alagappa College of Technology in any course are required to apply on the official website of the institute.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Alagappa College of Technology admission to all courses is entrance-based. Additionally, Candidates are required to fill out the eligibility criteria i.e.,pass Class 12for admission toBTech and pass graduationfor admission toPG courses.
Step 3: Final Seat Allotment/Fee Submission
Candidates who get shortlisted in the selection round must pay the Alagappa College of Technology fee to lock in the final seats.

placement_data.title: Alagappa College of Technology Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The Training and Placement Cell of Alagappa College of Technology works in coordination with the Centre for University-Industry Collaboration (CUIC). CUIC facilitates placement-related activities for final year UG/PG students of Anna University’s departments including Alagappa College of Technology, College of Engineering, Guindy and Madras Institute of Technology).

As per the latest available data, the highest package offered during Alagappa College of Technology placement 2025 for Chemical Engineering department stood at INR 18.5 LPA . The offer was made by CPCL Limited .
According to the placement data released by CUIC, the overall highest and average package offered during placements 2023 stood at INR 40 LPA and INR 8.54 LPA , respectively.

hostel_campus.college_name: Alagappa College of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: B.Tech in ceramic technology.
reviews.review_text: The campus made students successful leaders by inducing a positive mindset in all the freshers. The extracurricular activities are also initiated in the college to stabilize our mental health. Administration blocks are constructed at the entrance of the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in top companies.
reviews.review_text: In our department, a separate library is available, which helps us in finding various books . In the hostel, free Wi-Fi is available. There is a separate AC canteen for Teachers. There is a large ground. For medical facilities, a health center is available which works 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of its sports and extra-curricular activities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good and awesome. Classrooms are good and clean benches are provided for sitting. Class has a teaching board with modern technology attached with a projector. Hostel is neat and much better. Mess food is very bad. Wi-Fi is provided for hostel students. Library is also provided for study purposes.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not provided in our department, and mobiles are also prohibited during class hours. We can keep our mobiles with us but cannot use them during class hours. The class has a ceiling fan and benches. The teaching board is also available, and a projector is also available, which is very useful for PPT presentations.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is good, students can join here if they can follow self-studies.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi all over the university named Anna Wi-Fi. This connection is only for students who have laptops. For the hostel students, there is free Wi-Fi. The university has a library which is clean and good. It has a big place to learn.

reviews.review_heading: This college has excellent placement, great faculty members, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is hygienic and spread over a large area. There are well-equipped labs and large classrooms. There is a well-stocked library with a variety of books. We have Wi-Fi connectivity on campus. There are separate hostel facilities for boys and girls, with amenities like air conditioning, washing machines, and microwaves. Our campus has all kinds of sports facilities like cricket, football, badminton, volleyball, basketball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Alagappa College of Technology, Anna University review.
reviews.review_text: The labs and hostels are well maintained, and the food is good. The classrooms are okay, but some need better maintenance. Sports facilities are well-maintained, and there are clubs like NSS, NCC, and YRC. I'm in YRC, and it's necessary to join one of these clubs and volunteer in activities to get your degree certificate.

reviews.review_heading: Best engineering college for placements .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good and large. College is spread over 250 acres of land. Campus is beautiful along with a good life in college, and there are various clubs for students to join and gain their social life and interaction with other people. Hostels are well maintained and feel reasonable. Mess is hygiene, and food quality is good.

reviews.review_heading: My UG campus experience!
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the classroom, library, labs, and others is very nice, but the labs have old equipment, which is the only drawback. I am a day scholar, so I don't have any idea about the hostel and mess food. But as far as I've heard, my friends hate the mess food. The canteen, medical centre, and sports board are the best.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely amazing facilities and top most faculty. A Best college in my opinion.
reviews.review_text: Campus life is very good. Each and every individual department conducts two symposiums in a year. There are about 15 clubs in college that actively conduct various events for the students. Hostel facilities are very good. The maintenance price is very low, and a proper response is given by the hostel manager to any problem.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for Masters in engineering.
reviews.review_text: The campus is built on a large area and the infrastructure is good. Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs and auditorium halls are available. Medical assistance is available 24 hours a day on campus. The food in the mess is good and healthy. Canteens and grocery stores are available on campus. Hostels are also well maintained and secure for students; security is strict here.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and teachers are available here.
reviews.review_text: All kinds of facilities are available according to the requirements of students. Classes, labs, and other facilities are well-maintained. Libraries are well-stocked. Hostels are good and affordable in price. Messes are hygienic, and food is good. Sports grounds are available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and good campus life.
reviews.review_text: Many grounds are available to play games like cricket and football. The infrastructure of our college is good and all required faculty members are available. Wi-Fi is available 24 hours a day. Libraries are fully stocked. Hostels are affordable and well-maintained. Mainly, South Indian food is served in a mess. Hostel rooms are furnished and the size is also appropriate.

reviews.review_heading: Anna University is the best college for pursuing M.Tech.
reviews.review_text:
Each room has good infrastructure, and a projector is also available. Speakers and computers are also available. Unlimited food in a hostel with a different menu of different items is provided for 3 months, and you can also suggest those food items. Only register at a hostel for college admission. Rooms and PG hostels are available before the college.
Hostel Fee: INR 65,000 per year.

reviews.review_heading: It is a department with strict faculty members, low pass rate, and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. We don't have a network. Classrooms are clean. The library is useful. Wi-Fi facility is available in the hostel. The food served in the hostel and canteen is affordable. The canteen is crowded, and the food served is not tasty. They provide medical, sports, and games facilities.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Alagappa College of Technology, Anna University

likes.text: Farida Group of Leathers, Tata International Limited, Stahl India Pvt Ltd, Smit and zoon, Balmer Lawrie and other companies in Chennai and Ranipet visit our campus for recruitment.

review_content.Placements: The number of students placed in BE mechanical is approximately 80-90%. The average package is 10 LPA - 12 LPA. Top recruiters are Adani, Total Gas Gooderage, BEL, Quant, etc. About the internships, there are 2 type of internships, 1 is 6 week internship that is compulsory to do, and 2 one is 6 month which is not compulsory, you can do that if not you can give the exam for that semester.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good, not too bad according to the fee. I can say it is a good library, labs are average, and classrooms are average too. The hostel is not that good. The mess is okay, not too good but hostel fee is Rs 2,000 yearly.

Top recruiting companies for our course are Google, Amazon, Flipkart, IBM, Infosys, Springboard, and Techno.

overview_faqs.answer: Chandigarh College of Engineering and Technology is a well-known institution for UG Diploma, Ph.D, B.E. / B.Tech, After 10th Diploma, M.E./M.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Chandigarh College of Engineering and Technology has a rating of 3.85 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4 on Campus Life, 3.32 on Placements, 4.09 on Faculty and 3.57 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Chandigarh College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Never come here. Classrooms don't have proper working fans.

content.Placements: 90% you require without a homestay, if you are from Chandigarh, you have to score 80% to take admission in civil or mechanical. If you have to take the case and ECE, you have to take 90 from the last few years. Civil placement is very low, and the average package is about 4 LPA-5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: AC is available Only in teachers' cabins and academic cell. No AC is available in the class. The infrastructure is good, but they clock the gate. We have to walk from the parking to go to the next building, or we have to go to the first floor. The linkage is available, but the lift is not working in one building.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Really good in placements this year in 2025, and good in study too.

content.Placements: In mechanical atleast out of 35 students, 33 or 30 get placed. The highest package is 13 LPA, average is 7 LPA, and the lowest is 4 LPA. Top recruiting company for mechanical is Godrej. Students got internships in CSIO and BIS, some local companies too like BELL and DRDO.
content.Infrastructure: Girls hostel is clean and neat. Mess is good. Wi-Fi facility is there. We have a library. There are mess and canteen. Good food is available but not that good. But for boys hostel, it is somewhat mess. There is cold water to drink, and the hostel rooms have a balcony.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best college to consider.

content.Placements: The number of students placed in BE mechanical is approximately 80-90%. The average package is 10 LPA - 12 LPA. Top recruiters are Adani, Total Gas Gooderage, BEL, Quant, etc. About the internships, there are 2 type of internships, 1 is 6 week internship that is compulsory to do, and 2 one is 6 month which is not compulsory, you can do that if not you can give the exam for that semester.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are good, not too bad according to the fee. I can say it is a good library, labs are average, and classrooms are average too. The hostel is not that good. The mess is okay, not too good but hostel fee is Rs 2,000 yearly.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College is the best.

content.Placements: 85% of students got placed. The highest package is 1.5 crore per annum and the lowest salary is Rs. 30,000. Recruiting company is Google. 80% of students got placed in engineering and 70% of students got placed from our course. Top recruiting companies for our course are Google, Amazon, Flipkart, IBM, Infosys, Springboard, and Techno.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities are good. The food and hostel facilities are good. Medical and security are also good. Infrastructure and facilities in the hostel are very good. The food and hostel facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Everything is good here, and I encourage others to take admission in this college.

content.Placements: The college is insane. You will be taught some good skills and get hands-on experience. Some of the remarkable placements are 1crore LPA. While such packages are exceptional and rare, and the average package for CSE students has been quite solid, hovering between 6.2 LPA to 6.3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled, with great labs and good PCs. There are more than 3 playgrounds, special medical facilities, and great food with a good canteen. There are also cultural activities, sports events, etc.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

faqs.question: What is JAC Chandigarh Counselling 2026 schedule?
faqs.answer: The JAC Chandigarh 2026 counselling will be scheduled for BE/BTech admissions offered by the institutes in Chandigarh based on JEE Main scores and the Class 12th pass percentage or equivalent examination. hostel_campus.college_name: Chandigarh College of Engineering and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Never come here. Classrooms don't have proper working fans.
reviews.review_text: AC is available Only in teachers' cabins and academic cell. No AC is available in the class. The infrastructure is good, but they clock the gate. We have to walk from the parking to go to the next building, or we have to go to the first floor. The linkage is available, but the lift is not working in one building.

reviews.review_heading: Really good in placements this year in 2025, and good in study too.
reviews.review_text: Girls hostel is clean and neat. Mess is good. Wi-Fi facility is there. We have a library. There are mess and canteen. Good food is available but not that good. But for boys hostel, it is somewhat mess. There is cold water to drink, and the hostel rooms have a balcony.

reviews.review_heading: Best college to consider.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good, not too bad according to the fee. I can say it is a good library, labs are average, and classrooms are average too. The hostel is not that good. The mess is okay, not too good but hostel fee is Rs 2,000 yearly.

reviews.review_heading: College is the best.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are good. The food and hostel facilities are good. Medical and security are also good. Infrastructure and facilities in the hostel are very good. The food and hostel facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good here, and I encourage others to take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: The campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled, with great labs and good PCs. There are more than 3 playgrounds, special medical facilities, and great food with a good canteen. There are also cultural activities, sports events, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The real talk about the college.
reviews.review_text: The college has fully furnished labs and classrooms, with Wi-Fi facilities all over the campus. A 24/7 medical facility is there. The department has decent classrooms, all of which have projectors, and some are smart classrooms with smart screens. Labs are well-equipped. The library is actually helpful if you like to study in peace or need reference books. There is also a seminar hall for guest lectures.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, but if you get a quite good college or PEC, go there. For less fees, you can c
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is the best. There are big lecture halls with air-conditioning facilities on different blocks for every branch and there is an elevator facility available. Hostel is not the best, less number rooms are available and in one four students are living together. Your privacy might be a concern.

reviews.review_heading: The college with potential.
reviews.review_text: My college library is very nice. It has a lot of space for study. The design of the library is on the top. Wi-Fi speed is decent in the college. Classrooms have smart boards. The best food is very affordable at Rs. 50 for unlimited. It is very delicious. Medical facilities are also good. The sports infrastructure is good but lacks to give a facility like football, etc. We have to arrange them for ourselves.

reviews.review_heading: Stop blaming the college. Everyone realizes its value after leaving the college.
reviews.review_text: According to me, the overall infrastructure of CCET is pretty good. Although it has a small campus area, it still has good infrastructure. The most important point is that it is known for its cleanliness. The college also provides Wi-Fi facilities, but in some areas of the college, it’s not working properly. However, in the labs, there are Ethernet cables where everyone can get an internet connection easily. Classrooms are well-finished, and the library infrastructure is amazing.

reviews.review_heading: CCET got exposed by their own students.
reviews.review_text: Computer labs in our college are decent because half of the computers don't work and are too old, so students bring their own laptops. The library is good to study in, and many books are available there to read. I am a day scholar student, so I don't have to worry about hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Chandigarh College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: As a hosteller, you will be provided with rooms in good condition. The best part is that the washrooms of the hostels were recently renovated, so they are in the best condition right now. The total cost of the hostel is only around 4000 per year and the mess cost is around 2500 per month. You will be provided with Wi-Fi connections throughout the day. There is a small park in the boys hostel where you can play football, cricket, etc. with your friends.

reviews.review_heading: A mad campus with realistic people.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and all were really good, including classrooms and the library. Wi-Fi is available, and classes are clean. The quality of the mess is not good, but hostel rooms are good. Many sports facilities are available, and the campus provides various medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Chandigarh College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not good. Hostels are not good. They need renovation. It is better to stay in PGs.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good government college with a low fee, and it is located in a prime location in Chandigarh.
reviews.review_text: The college has Wi-Fi facilities, digital classrooms, a library, etc. It has proper lab facilities for our course. Labs are also good. The hostel facilities are decent, with very low fees. The hostel has a vegetarian mess. It serves decent food.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Chandigarh College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms are well-furnished. A projector is available in every classroom. Labs are well-equipped with high-end computers and GPUs. Other departments' workshops and labs have all the relevant and well-maintained machinery and equipment. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Sports are encouraged at the college. Sports grounds are available.

faqs.answer: A:    Vidyavardhini College of Engineering and Technology (VCET) accepts entrance exam scores from the MAH MBA CET and JEE Mains for MBA admission. Candidates must appear and qualify for the MAH MBA CET, and then register for the MAH MBA CET counseling. VCET also offers admissions to undergraduate engineering programs based on entrance exam scores. For example, candidates must qualify in the MHT-CET conducted by DTE, Maharashtra to be admitted to the FY B.E. program.  The overall cutoff for MHT-CET is 28.92–36.03 percentile. Some other MBA entrance exams in India include: GMAT, CAT, MAT, NMAT, XAT, CMAT, IIFT, TISSNET, IBSAT.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: A 3-tier college which has good Infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Among all the 180 students of the Computer Engineering Department, only 4-5 students have been placed until now, as only 4-5 companies have visited the college, such as OMP, Capgemini, etc. The highest package offered is 11.9 LPA, and the lowest package is 3.8 LPA, but the students placed are only 9%-10%. Top recruiting companies are Capgemini, Godrej Infotech, OMP, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms in our college are air-conditioned with the projectors provided within them. The labs are provided with Wi-Fi and AC facilities. The college also has a huge library. The food in our canteen is average, and there is a gymkhana for indoor games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Decent college experience with good exposure and scope for improvement.

review_content.Placements: Around 40-50% of the eligible students in the course are placed. The highest package is 12 LPA, the lowest package is 3 LPA, and average package is 6 LPA - 7 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, Bristlecone, Tech Mahindra, and Zeus Learning. Around 50-60% of students got internships at NSE, Feedspot, etc. Top roles offered are data analyst, software developer, project manager, and full stack developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our (department artificial intelligence and data science) has smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, and Wi-Fi. The library has good resources. Hostels are decent, mess food is average, and canteen is better. Basic medical help is available. Sports facilities include indoor and outdoor games.

review_summary.college_name: Vidyavardhini College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I like everything about college.

content.Placements: Not many students get placement, as I can see only about 10 to 20% students get placed. The packages are from low 2 to 3 LPA, to the highest 12 LPA. Also, a student got a job in perplexity for a 1 crore package. This year, my course got so many job offers, like 10 or more.
content.Infrastructure: College has all kinds of facilities, like high-speed Wi-Fi, labs, AC classrooms, a 3-floor library with computers for research, and a canteen on the 3rd floor. College also has 2 meeting halls where we hold events, or sometimes some entrepreneur come to give information about their company and how they reach there.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My college in reality is good.

content.Placements: This is a very good college. The student has got placements at TCS and local companies are recruiters. The freshers role is offered. The highest package offered is 30 LPA and the lowest can be 2.5 LPA on campus placements. Only a few students get the internship each year like some of them.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good and well maintained. Wi-Fi works, the library is a pretty big classroom also has good facilities. Labs are well structure well canteen have dynamic menu both veg and non veg. The college does not have a hostel but it has a girls common room.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A 3-tier college which has good Infrastructure.

content.Placements: Among all the 180 students of the Computer Engineering Department, only 4-5 students have been placed until now, as only 4-5 companies have visited the college, such as OMP, Capgemini, etc. The highest package offered is 11.9 LPA, and the lowest package is 3.8 LPA, but the students placed are only 9%-10%. Top recruiting companies are Capgemini, Godrej Infotech, OMP, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms in our college are air-conditioned with the projectors provided within them. The labs are provided with Wi-Fi and AC facilities. The college also has a huge library. The food in our canteen is average, and there is a gymkhana for indoor games.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Decent college experience with good exposure and scope for improvement.

content.Placements: Around 40-50% of the eligible students in the course are placed. The highest package is 12 LPA, the lowest package is 3 LPA, and average package is 6 LPA - 7 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, Bristlecone, Tech Mahindra, and Zeus Learning. Around 50-60% of students got internships at NSE, Feedspot, etc. Top roles offered are data analyst, software developer, project manager, and full stack developer.
content.Infrastructure: Our (department artificial intelligence and data science) has smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, and Wi-Fi. The library has good resources. Hostels are decent, mess food is average, and canteen is better. Basic medical help is available. Sports facilities include indoor and outdoor games.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely good if you get in right department, there are a lot of departmental issues.

content.Placements: Last year, 2024-25, the average students placed were about 20-30% and a few opted for a Master's as a career option. Highest package was about 12 LPA (on campus), and about 3.5 LPA was lowest package. Top recruiters were Content Sack, TCS, Infosys, etc. Top roles offered were in development, and few in consulting.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi network is pretty good, the coverage is also decent, but it is not quite good in the labs. Classrooms are good with modern teaching equipment like projectors. There is no hostel facility in the college. Students generally rent a room in a group of 3-4. Sports and games have a fixed time to use, beyond that, the equipment is locked away.

admission_overview.title: Vidyavardhini's College of Engineering and Technology Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Vidyavardhini's College of Engineering and Technology admission 2025 is completely entrance-based. The college offers courses at the undergraduate and postgraduate levels. To be admitted to the Vidyavardhinis College of Engineering and Technology, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. Also known as VCET, the college accepts applications via the Centralised Admission Process and considers valid scores obtained in several national and state-level exams, such as MAH CET, XAT, MAT, etc. The college offers programmes in the fields of Engineering, Technology, and Management. The college is affiliated with the University of Mumbai. Read the following article to know more about Vidyavardhini's College of Engineering and Technology admission, including the admission criteria and procedure.

faqs.question: How does Vidyavardhini's College of Engineering and Technology shortlist students for its courses?

faqs.answer: Vidyavardhini College of Engineering and Technology (VCET) accepts entrance exam scores from the MAH MBA CET and JEE Mains for MBA admission. Candidates must appear and qualify for the MAH MBA CET, and then register for the MAH MBA CET counseling. VCET also offers admissions to undergraduate engineering programs based on entrance exam scores. For example, candidates must qualify in the MHT-CET conducted by DTE, Maharashtra to be admitted to the FY B.E. program.  The overall cutoff for MHT-CET is 28.92–36.03 percentile. Some other MBA entrance exams in India include: GMAT, CAT, MAT, NMAT, XAT, CMAT, IIFT, TISSNET, IBSAT.

VCET accepts applications via the Centralised Admission Process and considers valid scores obtained in several national and state-level exams, such as MAH CET, XAT, MAT, etc. The College offers respective courses with total tuition fees ranging from INR 2.02 Lacs to INR 5.2 Lakh. Comparing with other Colleges that offer BTech, VCET fee structure might seem unreasonable. However, considering the facilities provided, the cost justifies.

admission_process.title: Vidyavardhini's College of Engineering and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Vidyavardhini's College of Engineering and Technology admission processincludes application, selection, document verification, and admission confirmation. As admissions are mainly entrance-based, students need to register on the MHTCET portal. Seat allotment is done throughCAP counselling. The application process is conducted online. Interested students can follow the step-by-stepVCET, Vasai admission processexplained below:
1: Application
Students can visit the official website of MAHCET to start the application process. At the time of application, students need to upload the specified documents and ensure the validity of the same.
2: Selection Rounds

Students will be selected based on their entrance exam scores. Aspirants must JEE Main, MHT CET for BTech course, GATE, MHTCET MTech for MTech and MAH CET for MMS course. Seats are allocated through the CAP counselling. Hence, candidates must participate in the same.
3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot and confirm the seat, candidates are required to pay theVCET Vasai feesat the admission receipt centre.

faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for MMS at Vidyavardhini's College of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: Vidyavardhini's College of Engineering and Technology offers a full-time MMS in the field of Management. The MMS tuition fee at Vidyavardhini's College of Engineering and Technology is INR 2.02 lakh for two years. Besides the tuition fee, the VCET Mumbai MMS fee structure includes various other components, such as development fee, admission process fee, caution money (refundable), etc. Interested candidates can visit the college's official website for the detailed fee structure. It must be noted that the mentioned fee information is sourced from the official website of the college/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

description: Vidyavardhini College of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Vidyavardhini College of Engineering and Technology JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:

The Vidyavardhini College of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Vidyavardhini College of Engineering and Technology BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 72535 and 486282 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.E. in Information Technology was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 72535 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 94563 in 2023 and 119495 in 2022. On analysing the cutoff data of three years, B.E. in Information Technology demonstrated a declining trend.

Vidyavardhini's College of Engineering and Technology accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Vidyavardhini College of Engineering and Technology can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Vidyavardhini College of Engineering and Technology JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for Vidyavardhini's College of Engineering and Technology.

MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the Home State quota. For the General category, the Vidyavardhini College of Engineering and Technology B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 71.17 and 91.42, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Computer Science, which had the highest cutoff percentile of 91.42. Similarly, with a lowest last-round cutoff percentile of 71.1

Vidyavardhini College of Engineering and Technology MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Computer Science turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 91.42. For the same competitive branch, the last round cutoff was 94.69 in the General category under the HS quota.
Some of the important dates related to MHT CET 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

The Vidyavardhini College of Engineering and Technology MAH MBA CET cutoff 2025 is provided in the table below for MMS admission, among other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories. For the General AI category, the last-round cutoff percentile for MBA admission was 9.92. For the same course, the cutoff stood at 17.32 in the first round. More details are given below:

Candidates can refer to the table below to view and compare the last three years of MAH MBA CET cutoff data for admission to the MBA course. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA admission at Vidyavardhini College of Engineering and Technology was 9.92. For the same course, the last round cutoff was 20.94 in 2024, while in 2023, the cutoff was concluded at 69.31.

Analysing MAH MBA CET cutoff trends provides invaluable insights to students into how admission dynamics and competitiveness for different courses change over time. Students can download year-wise cutoff lists from the table given below to have a better idea of the cutoff percentile changes over the years.

According to the last round of M.E./M.Tech cutoff 2025 for the General HS category, the top two most competitive specialisations were M.Tech. in Structural Engineering, followed by M.Tech. in Computer Engineering, with the cutoff being 11.02 and 1.15, respectively.
See the table below for more such comparisons about other categories in different rounds and years.
