reviews.review_heading: I like everything about college.
reviews.review_text: College has all kinds of facilities, like high-speed Wi-Fi, labs, AC classrooms, a 3-floor library with computers for research, and a canteen on the 3rd floor. College also has 2 meeting halls where we hold events, or sometimes some entrepreneur come to give information about their company and how they reach there.

reviews.review_heading: My college in reality is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good and well maintained. Wi-Fi works, the library is a pretty big classroom also has good facilities. Labs are well structure well canteen have dynamic menu both veg and non veg. The college does not have a hostel but it has a girls common room.

reviews.review_heading: A 3-tier college which has good Infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms in our college are air-conditioned with the projectors provided within them. The labs are provided with Wi-Fi and AC facilities. The college also has a huge library. The food in our canteen is average, and there is a gymkhana for indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Decent college experience with good exposure and scope for improvement.
reviews.review_text: Our (department artificial intelligence and data science) has smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, and Wi-Fi. The library has good resources. Hostels are decent, mess food is average, and canteen is better. Basic medical help is available. Sports facilities include indoor and outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good if you get in right department, there are a lot of departmental issues.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi network is pretty good, the coverage is also decent, but it is not quite good in the labs. Classrooms are good with modern teaching equipment like projectors. There is no hostel facility in the college. Students generally rent a room in a group of 3-4. Sports and games have a fixed time to use, beyond that, the equipment is locked away.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, placement, and faculty too.
reviews.review_text: Overall, it's good. College has a library too, with free Wi-Fi. Good faculty for mechanical subjects like thermodynamics, CAD/CAM, and material testing. All labs are good, and there is also a workshop where maintenance is good. All machines are there in the labs, and all equipment is available in the labs.

reviews.review_heading: It provides an enhanced infrastructure in 2025.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is getting awesome nowadays. It includes an air-conditioned classroom equipped with projectors, Wi-Fi facility, and drinking water facility (cold and normal). There are also lifts in the college. This current year, that is, 2025, our college infrastructure is improving too. The college is equipped with a library to help students learn new things.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and infrastructure, but poor faculty support.
reviews.review_text: Our department has well-maintained computer labs, project labs, smart classrooms, and Wi-Fi across campus. The library is well-stocked with technical books and has a digital section too. The hostel rooms are decent, with 2/3-seaters available. Washrooms are cleaned regularly. There is 24x7 Wi-Fi, and security is good. The mess food is average but hygienic. Canteens offer a good variety at reasonable prices. Medical facilities are available with a full-time nurse and a visiting doctor. The colleg...

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure with well-developed labs.
reviews.review_text: Everything is good in regard to infrastructure and other resources like the lab and library. The only problem is the range of Wi-Fi, it's not available in the hostel. The canteen has good vibes, but the food is average. Sports are suboptimal, don’t see many sports events, only one happens over a period of one year.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for students who want to pursue engineering.
reviews.review_text: There is individual Wi-Fi available on every floor. Labs are all modern and classrooms are big. We have every bench that is also big and sufficient for students. The canteen also provides good food which I will not say is cheap but affordable. We also have gymkhana where carrom and table tennis are available for students.

reviews.review_heading: The college encourages students to participate in various events and workshops.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and hostel facilities of my college are quite good. The campus is well-maintained with modern classrooms, well-equipped labs, and a decent library that supports students' academic needs. The hostel offers a comfortable living environment with clean rooms, good food, and necessary amenities like Wi-Fi and security.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for engineering. I recommend students join this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has all facilities. The college provides 5G Wi-Fi for every student. There are labs for each department. In the mechanical department, which I am pursuing, there is a CAD lab that includes software like CAD, SolidWorks, and ANSYS. Our college has a 3-floor library which includes books and PCs for work.

reviews.review_heading: The college is decent.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available, and the library is perfect. Facilities given are decent but not enough. It has a good campus, computers, and other facilities. However, the feeling of satisfaction is not there.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has excellent infrastructure, well-maintained labs with the latest equipment. Classrooms are well-equipped with air conditioning. Wi-Fi is available in every lab. The library is very huge with over 40000 books overall for all the branches. The canteen provides good and healthy food. Cricket, badminton, kabaddi, etc., are sports played by many students here.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college offers AC classrooms, Wi-Fi access, well-maintained departmental labs, and a multi-storey library with digital resources like IEEE and ASME journals. However, there is no on-campus hostel; students rely on nearby PGs. The canteen food is decent but varies in quality. Medical facilities include first aid and a visiting doctor. Sports and gym facilities are available, but need better maintenance and upgrades to support regular activities. The campus is well-connected and clean, but the...

college_info.college_name: Vidyavardhini College of Engineering and Technology Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Vidyavardhini College of Engineering and Technology Vasai Road offers courses at the UG and PG level in various specialisations. The Institute offers BTech and M.Tech for the durations varying from 2 years to 4 years with a total course fees worth INR 5.20 Lakh. Admission to the respective courses is offered on the basis of merit and accepted entrance exams. Therefore, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate in Class 12 and secure valid scores in entrance exams such as JEE Main.

Vidyavardhini College of Engineering and Technology offers courses at the undergraduate and postgraduate levels. VCET accepts applications via the Centralised Admission Process and considers valid scores obtained in several national and state-level exams, such as MAH CET, XAT, MAT, etc. The College offers respective courses with total tuition fees ranging from INR 2.02 Lacs to INR 5.2 Lakh. Comparing with other Colleges that offer BTech, VCET fee structure might seem unreasonable. However, considering the facilities provided, the cost justifies.
Vidyavardhini's College of Engineering and Technology offers different types of scholarship. Students can check the list below:

Yes, students enrolled in various courses at VCET Mumbai are eligible to avail themselves of a variety of scholarships. Some of these scholarships are offered based on the caste/ reservation categories of the candidates. Listed below are some scholarships offered to SC/ ST candidates at VCET Mumbai:

college_info.intro:
The modes of Indian Institute of Information Technology, Kottayam admission are online and offline. Admission to various courses is based on entrance examination scores and merit. At the UG level, the institute offers BTech courses to students. At the PG level, the institute offers MTech courses to students. BTech is provided in four specialisations and the institute also provides PhD courses to students.
IIIT Kottayam LMS is a renowned institute because of its flagship BTech and MTech courses. BTech and MTech students are placed in top companies such as Amazon, IBM, Jio, Deloitte, and others. The institute offers BTech specialisation in Computer Science & Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Cyber Security, and Artificial Intelligence & Data Science. Below mentioned are some of the popular programmes offered by IIIT Kottayam and their respective IIIT Kottayam fees and eligibility:

faqs.answer: A:    Studying at IIIT Kottayam is not expensive. faqs.answer: A:    IIIT Kottayam is a renowned institute which offers UG and PG courses to the students. LSM IIIT Kottayam admission is based on entrance exam. Selected candidates will be required to report to the admission cell at IIIT Kottayam for document verification and fee payment leading to final seat allotment.

faqs.answer: IIIT Allahabad accpets JEE Main score for admission to the BTech courses. admission_process.title: IIIT Kottayam Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: IIIT Kottayamadmission process includes the application process, selection round, cutoff, merit list and counselling. Candidates need to pass respective entrance exams for admission. Find below the complete process forIIIT Kottayam admission 2026:
1: IIIT Kottayam Application Process 2026

For IIIT Kottayam BTech admission, candidates must visit the official website of NTA to apply for the JEE Main entrance exam. Aspirants need to fill out the form on the institute's website for MTech and PhD courses.
2. Entrance Exam

Aspirants need to appear for a written test conducted by the institute for iMTech and MTech for Working Professionals. The institute also conducts a assessment for e-MTech programme. Admission to PhD course is based on written test score and performance of candidates in personal interview round. Aspirants also need to pass PI for admission to MTech courses.
2: Cutoff List

After the application process, JoSAA/ CSAB releases a course-wise cutoff list for BTech. The cutoff list indicates the minimum required score in the respective entrance exam for a candidate to become eligible for admission. Candidates with a score equal to or more than the cutoff marks can apply.
3: Counselling
Candidates applying for a BTech course further have to go through JoSAA for seat allotment. A provisional list of selected candidates is released for MTech courses.
4: IIIT Kottayam Admission Confirmation
After the selection rounds and counselling, seats are allotted to the eligible candidates. Selected students must pay theIIIT Kottayam feesto confirm their seats.

IIIT Kottayam fees for all these courses include multiple components, such as the tuition fee, hostel fee, etc. The fee amount varies from one course to another. In the total course fee, some components are paid every semester, while some are one-time. Also, the IIIT Kottayam seats may differ for each BTech and MTech specialisation. Candidates can check the following table for a detailed of fees and IIIT Kottayam seat intake for all the available courses:
Note:The above-mentioned fee & seat intake details are sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and are subject to change.

description: IIIT Kottayam cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the IIIT Kottayam JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:
Important: Top IIITs Cutoff for JEE Main: Past Years Cutoff Ranks and Trends

In this section, candidates can view the last 8 years of IIIT Kottayam JEE Main cutoff ranks for various courses and categories by clicking on the download now links that is given below to understand the past years' trends.

IIIT Kottayam JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the IIIT Kottayam CSE cutoff 2025 was 39587 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. For other core branch, such as ECE, the JEE Main last round closing ranks for admission was 55182, for the General category. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for admission.

For the General AI category students, the IIIT Kottayam B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 39587 and 55979 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 39587 and 50277, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Data Science) and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at IIIT Kottayam. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at IIIT Kottayam to understand the cutoff trends.

Tabulated below are the BTech specialisations available for admission based on the last round closing ranks of JEE Main. This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of IIIT Kottayam. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

IIIT Kottayam also accepts DASA UG scores for BE/ BTech and BArch admission. As per cutoff 2022, the last round closing ranks for the top courses including B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was 902 and for B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering was 843 for the General category All India candidates. hostel_campus.college_name: IIIT Kottayam Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: Hostel: There is one hostel for boys and one hostel for girls
Bank and ATM: IIIT Kottayam campus has a 24x7 State Bank of India ATM facility
Library: The library has a collection of a large number of books and subscriptions of newspapers, magazines, and journals
Sports: The facilities to play various indoor and outdoor games such as table tennis, badminton, football, chess, volleyball, etc. are available
Internet: IIIT Kottayam campus is equipped with 1 GBPS bandwidth Wi-Fi connectivity. There is no limitation on the timing of Internet usage

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty, infrastructure, and facilities provided in the college.
reviews.review_text: They provide good facilities to the students, and we have 24/7 Wi-Fi available. All labs are well maintained with air conditioning, and classrooms are cleaned every day. It is located in Kerala, so we have a good climate around the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Indian Institute of Information Technology, Kottayam, is an absolutely good college for studying.
reviews.review_text: The hostel in our college can accommodate up to 100 people. Each room consists of 3 members. The infrastructure is very good and always maintains hygiene. The food does not include only Kerala food, but also the food from other states is available here. The medical facilities are very good and available 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: This college is for students who want to explore and have the college atmosphere at the same time.
reviews.review_text: The quality of the hostel is good and okay, and the Wi-Fi is also good. But the internet is difficult to reach in some places. First year students can't stay in the campus hostel. They should stay outside of the campus. The buses will come every day to pick them up. Coming to the infrastructure, it is basic to good in my opinion. I can say that it is not that bad.

reviews.review_heading: Most number of startups along with placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi connections are pretty mediocre, they always disconnect in the middle. Labs are okay and classrooms are good. There is only a single library available on the whole campus which is decent enough with enough books. Hostel rooms are just okay to survive and the quality of food is below average in mess. The quality of food in canteen is decent and medical facilities are sufficient enough. Sports and games facilities are not that good but okay to play games like badminton and kabbadi.

reviews.review_heading: It is a pretty average choice college for competitive students.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available throughout campus. Labs have mostly up-to-date equipment. The library is not often used but has an average amount of books. The quality of the food is bad, and most of the students resort to eat outside. It is manageable to eat the mess food as it does not give anybody food poisoning, etc. Medical facilities are basic almost like a school but they provide insurance to a hospital nearby. Sports is not given a lot of priority. Grounds are still in development. However, the colle...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the college because my college life became so bad in this college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is provided in labs and classrooms. And the infrastructure is good for labs and classrooms but the AC is not there in labs and classrooms. The food quality in the mess is good and the hostel facilities are good. Sports and games facilities are like a normal school, not up to my expectations.

reviews.review_heading: Overview of Indian Institute of Information Technology Kottayam .
reviews.review_text: The hostels are very good infrastructure-wise, but the freshers should stay outside campus hostels for their first year due to the limited number of hostels inside campus. Labs are well developed. Classrooms are good, and Wi-Fi is above average. Mess is above decent.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with Infrastructure of IIIT Kottayam.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is unreliable, often switching off, but classrooms and department facilities are satisfactory. Sports and games are encouraged, although the quality of the mess is inconsistent—sometimes subpar, though it has improved recently. Medical facilities are adequate.

reviews.review_heading: Decent placements and developing infrastructure and facilities, but fees are slightly overpriced.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good with Wi-Fi support, digital boards, etc. Labs have most of the necessary equipments required in adequate amount (Computer labs even have proper Ethernet connections). Hostel facilities are fine and adjustable, except for the insects (since the campus is located in a lush green place). Mess is unified, not hostel-wise. The quality of mess food recently varied because of increase in the number of students and lack of kitchen space. However, the two canteens (Milma Shop and Scoo...

college_info.intro:
Global Academy of Technology Bangalore comprises more than 10 departments including the Department of Computer Science & Engineering, the Department of Mechanical Engineering, and the Department of Aeronautical Engineering, among others. Through these departments, the institute offers various courses.
BE and MBA are the flagship programmes of GAT Bangalore. The MBA programme is offered for a duration of two years in various specialisations such as Marketing, Finance, and Human Resource Management. The institute also offers the option of dual specialisation to its students. The BE programme at GAT Bangalore is offered for a duration of four years in over 9 specialisations, some of which are mentioned below:

Global Academy of Technology has more than 10 departments offering UG and PG courses in several specialisations. At the UG level, GAT Bangalore offers the BE programme. The MTech programme is offered in several specialisations including Computer Science, Digital Electronics, and Thermal Engineering, among others.

reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, but no good placements.

review_content.Placements: The placements of this college are not good. The top recruiters of this college are Infosys and IBM. This college has an average of 6 LPA. review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is good. It has one of the best campuses in Bangalore. This college encourages sports, they conduct inter and intra-college tournaments. But if we compare with other colleges, even sports-wise, this college lies behind.

reviews_list.review_title: Good teaching faculty and a very good study environment for students.

review_content.Placements: Placements here are average. Around 40-50% of students will be placed. The highest package is 20 LPA. review_content.Infrastructure: The college offers a very good environment for students. The college is vast and covered in greenery. The college is completely Wi-Fi enabled for students. review_summary.college_name: GAT Bangalore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, Global Academy of Technology is a good college.

content.Placements: Placements are moderate compared to the previous batch. The highest package was 11 LPA, and the lowest was 3.5 LPA. Recruiting companies were Infosys, Tech Mahindra, IBM, Cognizant, Federal Bank, Bosch, Juspay, and MuSigma. The highest package was offered by Juspay.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is well-maintained and comfortable for studying and focusing. Wi-Fi connection is not up to that mark. The hostel food is not good. It's just a waste of resources. The sports department is supportive and also conducts tournaments every semester of all types.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Surroundings around the college should be improved.

content.Placements: At least 60-70% of students get placed in my course, which I study according to the seniors. The highest package is 22 LPA, and the average package ranges from 4-6 LPA. 80% of students get internships. Companies are from the college side. Infosys and many start-ups related to the course are top recruiting companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is nice, but now we are having a shortage of classrooms. The campus has Wi-Fi, and labs are also well-maintained. Classrooms have modern projectors. The library is well-maintained with a digital library. The quality of hostel food is decent. They support very much for students interested in sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, but no good placements.

content.Placements: The placements of this college are not good. The top recruiters of this college are Infosys and IBM. This college has an average of 6 LPA. Due to low salary packages, most students prefer to take placements off campus. The highest package is 30 LPA and the lowest one is 1 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is good. It has one of the best campuses in Bangalore. This college encourages sports, they conduct inter and intra-college tournaments. But if we compare with other colleges, even sports-wise, this college lies behind.

individual_reviews.course: B.E in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good teaching faculty and a very good study environment for students.

content.Placements: Placements here are average. Around 40-50% of students will be placed. The highest package is 20 LPA. Top recruiting companies that will be visiting the college are IBM, Infosys, etc. Almost all students who were good in their studies got internship opportunities from the college.
content.Infrastructure: The college offers a very good environment for students. The college is vast and covered in greenery. The college is completely Wi-Fi enabled for students. Classrooms are spacious and clean. The laboratories are well-occupied with good infrastructure and up-to-date machines. The library is vast and has a very good environment.

individual_reviews.course: B.E in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: All about our Global Academy of Technology.

content.Placements: Among our college students, who got selected were fewer in number, around 10%. The highest package was around 12 LPA, and the lowest was 5 LPA. IBM and Tech Mahindra are the top companies. All students got internships from different companies. I am not sure about the roles which they have got in those companies.
content.Infrastructure: Faculty members of our college are in every classroom. There is free Wi-Fi, and every department has its own labs. The labs are filled with the required amount of items. For every person, they have the equipment. The food provided by the hostel was very good and better compared to any other hostel.

description: Global Academy of Technology cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

Global Academy of Technology Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 26028 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 15082 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was less competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at Global Academy of Technology. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 26028 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 5606, while in 2023, it was 6081.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.
Candidates preparing for 2026 admission can refer to the table below to view some of the important dates related to Karnataka PGCET 2026.

Global Academy of Technology accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering has the lowest cutoff rank of 29774 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 28786, in the General All India quota.
For other categories, rounds and quotas, use the filter options below:

According to the Global Academy of Technology B.E. / B.Tech Cutoff 2025, the closing rank for B.E in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science Engineering stood at 55758 among the students belonging to the General AI quota.

For the HS quota, the cutoff rank for the same specialisation was 98558. Comparing both the quotas, the last round cutoff rank for General AI category students was more competitive for admission than the HS quota students.

hostel_campus.college_name: GAT Bangalore Infrastructure Details & Reviews

library.description: College has a state-of the-art Library with a collection of more than 35000 books, 250 technical journals (69 Indian and 167 International), 3300+ CDs, 300 DVDs, etc.
College has a state-of the-art Library with a collection of more than 35000 books, 250 technical journals (69 Indian and 167 International), 3300+ CDs, 300 DVDs, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, Global Academy of Technology is a good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well-maintained and comfortable for studying and focusing. Wi-Fi connection is not up to that mark. The hostel food is not good. It's just a waste of resources. The sports department is supportive and also conducts tournaments every semester of all types.

reviews.review_heading: Surroundings around the college should be improved.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is nice, but now we are having a shortage of classrooms. The campus has Wi-Fi, and labs are also well-maintained. Classrooms have modern projectors. The library is well-maintained with a digital library. The quality of hostel food is decent. They support very much for students interested in sports.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, but no good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is good. It has one of the best campuses in Bangalore. This college encourages sports, they conduct inter and intra-college tournaments. But if we compare with other colleges, even sports-wise, this college lies behind.

reviews.review_heading: Good teaching faculty and a very good study environment for students.
reviews.review_text: The college offers a very good environment for students. The college is vast and covered in greenery. The college is completely Wi-Fi enabled for students. Classrooms are spacious and clean. The laboratories are well-occupied with good infrastructure and up-to-date machines. The library is vast and has a very good environment.

reviews.review_heading: All about our Global Academy of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members of our college are in every classroom. There is free Wi-Fi, and every department has its own labs. The labs are filled with the required amount of items. For every person, they have the equipment. The food provided by the hostel was very good and better compared to any other hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are very average in 2025. I am satisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available and the infrastructure is good. But the quality of food served in the hostel is average. Wi-Fi is available, but it does not work most of the time. Sports and games are encouraged. Classrooms are well-maintained. Overall, it is average.

reviews.review_heading: Our college contains good infrastructure and good teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is very nice compared to other colleges because it contains a garden area, sports complex, more classrooms, and an auditorium. The hostel is also good compared to other college hostels. I don't know much about the hostel because I stay at home, but my friends say that the food is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, with a good environment and teachers.
reviews.review_text: GAT has well-equipped classrooms with projectors, computer labs, and department-specified labs. Campus is Wi-Fi enabled and library contains a wide range of books. There are spacious playgrounds for outdoor games and events. Auditorium and seminar halls are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty were friendly but placements was bad. Infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The campus is good, but the canteen can get crowded. The labs were good, with good computers and good teachers. The lab attendees were okay. The college Wi-Fi is very weak. There is a basketball court, a professional cricket ground, and a college gym with basic equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good with good teaching and staff.
reviews.review_text: The course is very good since AI is the future. AI can be learned thoroughly through this course. Also, machine learning is included, which makes it more helpful. Hostel facilities are good. Food quality is average. Hostel infrastructure is good. It is near the college.

reviews.review_heading: It's a good college, but not for placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Hostel food is okay, not very tasty. The Wi-Fi signal is very low; even when connected, it won’t work. The labs are pretty good and well cleaned. The library has a lot of books; anyhow, the infrastructure of our college is good.

reviews.review_heading: Average college to study in
reviews.review_text: The facilities are okayish. The washroom is very unhygienic and it smells and infrastructure is good compared to other college but a very small auditorium and the wifi is horrible. Library is good, it has almost all the books required. The hostel is horrible. The food served is unhygienic. They removed the only vending machine for snacks we had.

reviews.review_heading:
Really good infrastructure and facilities 
Placements are average .
reviews.review_text: The faculty members are well experienced. They try to teach things in a good way. The classrooms are spacious. Labs are well-equipped. We have a big library where books are available on all subjects, not only those related to your course but also other books. The hostel has good infrastructure. Anyway, hostel food is the same as any other hostel. You will enjoy the Wi-Fi in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Global Academy of Technology review.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is massive with decent facilities. The college is also very big with multiple buildings, is situated on a hill, and has a very nice view. A decent library and Wi-Fi are available throughout the campus pretty much. The canteen is pretty average, and the cricket ground is also massive.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Global Academy of Technology.
reviews.review_text:
All the varieties taste same in the hostel, which is not maintained properly Instead, you go to nearby PG with proper food and stay.
Infrastructure: it is a good view from afar (huge white building, which is also known as Bengaluru white House). As this looks cool, this college lags for small land (less acres comparatively to other colleges) .

likes.text: Top recruiting companies are Infosys Capgemini, Tech Mahindra, NTT, Data, Bosch, Mercedes, Benz, Sankalp Semiconductor, Accenture, Mindtree, Sonata, Wipro, etc.
They will be teaching students about placements and handling them from the beginning of the college, and it helps students to improve their skills.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Truth reality of MBM University Jodhpur.

content.Placements: There are lots of opportunities for placements on college campus but many students prefer off-campus opportunities compared to on-campus. If I want to say there are 8 LPA average package. Basically, in our college, placements depend largely on students.
content.Infrastructure: The college hostel does not provide clean rooms and bathrooms, so hostlers face a lot of problems there, and also, the hostel food is not good. The infrastructure of the college is also very poor. Dirty classrooms, no working fans, and not enough big classrooms.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good ROI and decent IT jobs.

content.Placements: Placement rate is 55-70 percent. The highest package is 20.71 LPA, the average package is 6.5 LPA-7.6 LPA, and the median package is 6.8 LPA. The lowest package is 4 LPA-5 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS, Capgemini, Wipro, Adani, Vedanta, L&T, Airtel, Tata Steel, Bosch, and BEL. Most students receive internships in varied companies. Top roles are software roles and core engineering roles.
content.Infrastructure: Good overall with smart classrooms, labs, library, and research space, but some equipment is outdated. Separate hostels are available. Girls' hostels are usually better maintained. Boys' hostels are equipped with basic facilities. In the mess and canteen, the average food quality& canteen exist, but it isn't outstanding. Basic medical centre on campus and sports fields, and indoor blocks for activities.

content.Infrastructure: Hostels are so good. Many buildings are there. A very big area for playing. The hostel infrastructure is so good. Many students live there. The ecosystem is very good. The food quality is very good. Hostel 7 and hostel 8 are specially made for boys of 1 year.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good curriculum and decent infrastructure.

content.Placements: Around 40% of students are placed, including tech and core branches, the highest package is 16 LPA and the lowest is 4.5 LPA. Companies like MiniOrange, Kanerika, and Herald recruited students, almost all the students got internships, mostly in DRDO Jodhpur, roles offered include software engineer, AI engineer, and data analyst.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are decent, but the labs are outdated, most systems have 4GB RAM, which is not enough to run even basic applications. Most students use their own laptops, Wi-Fi has a very poor signal, so nobody uses it. Hostels are fine, but the food is not good enough to eat daily. Students often eat outside or order from online food delivery apps.

reviews.review_heading: Truth reality of MBM University Jodhpur.
reviews.review_text: The college hostel does not provide clean rooms and bathrooms, so hostlers face a lot of problems there, and also, the hostel food is not good. The infrastructure of the college is also very poor. Dirty classrooms, no working fans, and not enough big classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Good ROI and decent IT jobs.
reviews.review_text: Good overall with smart classrooms, labs, library, and research space, but some equipment is outdated. Separate hostels are available. Girls' hostels are usually better maintained. Boys' hostels are equipped with basic facilities. In the mess and canteen, the average food quality& canteen exist, but it isn't outstanding. Basic medical centre on campus and sports fields, and indoor blocks for activities.

reviews.review_heading: Very good, in my experience.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are so good. Many buildings are there. A very big area for playing. The hostel infrastructure is so good. Many students live there. The ecosystem is very good. The food quality is very good. Hostel 7 and hostel 8 are specially made for boys of 1 year.

reviews.review_heading: Average placement in mining.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. Campus is large. Each branch department is there. Hostels are not quite good. There are three-seater rooms in hostel. Library is very large in college and consists of books. Seniors are very helpful. College has every type of sports ground.

reviews.review_heading: Good curriculum and decent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are decent, but the labs are outdated, most systems have 4GB RAM, which is not enough to run even basic applications. Most students use their own laptops, Wi-Fi has a very poor signal, so nobody uses it. Hostels are fine, but the food is not good enough to eat daily. Students often eat outside or order from online food delivery apps.

reviews.review_heading: Earlier, college was good, but now there are poor teachers, weak facilities, and average placements.
reviews.review_text: There is no WiFi available, no proper AC in classrooms, and mostly lectures are cancelled in my course. Computers are Windows 7 with i3 processors. Otherwise, the college is good. The hostel has only basic facilities like decent rooms and a big area for sports. There are zero extra facilities in the hostel, no WiFi, no canteen on the hostel campus, poor quality of food available in the mess, broken doors and windows, and fans that are not working properly.

reviews.review_heading: Alumni is strong in this college.
reviews.review_text: Not that many problems have to be faced like the food quality and other facilities too. Wi-Fi is also the biggest issue to face. Canteen is not that much good. Classrooms are average. Medical facilities are not available here. Various types of sports are available in our college, so all this is from my side.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is provided to the department. AC labs and well-furnished classrooms are available to all departments. Hostels are in good condition for girls but for boys they are just fine. Mess is provided. But sports and games are not provided for hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure with good faculty members and excellent support.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not that much good as it is an old architecture. Ethernet cables and AC labs are provided to us for our department. We also get a library. We have different hostels for different years. Wi-Fi is also provided to us this year.

reviews.review_heading: Reality of MBM College Jodhpur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here is very old, with water leakage in many areas. Wi-Fi is not available in the college. Lab conditions are also poor, as most of the equipment doesn't work properly. The classrooms are good, but sometimes there are no fans. The library is big, but it lacks a proper collection of books. My college provides hostel and mess facilities. The hostel charges are quite good, with the Grandpa Hostel costing Rs. 1,000 per month, but the quality of food in the mess is not very good.

reviews.review_heading: Real truth about MBM University.
reviews.review_text: In-depth labs are too old, they need to be renovated. Our computer labs, available library, also Wi-Fi available classrooms are good. Some classrooms have access to AC. Hostel life is good, not bad. Mess food is normal, not as good as, but you can survive, and quality is medium. The hostel rooms are old and need to be replaced with new hostel rooms for boys as well.

reviews.review_heading: The condition of the MBM College.
reviews.review_text: On a college campus, the infrastructure is quite old, Wi-Fi is not working properly, lab instruments are not working in condition, the library has books, but those books are very old and are of no use now. The hostel campus is 1.3 km away from the college, you can easily see cracked walls, and the quality of food is the worst. We have to spend money on eating fast food, because the food made in a mess is the worst. There are no medical facilities in hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Best government engineering college.
reviews.review_text: One of the oldest engineering colleges in Rajasthan, its infrastructure is similarly old. The library is well-stocked with a decent number of books. The boys' hostel is old, while the girls' hostel is newly built. The mess serves average food. There's a government dispensary right in front of the hostel campus, and sports grounds are also available.

reviews.review_heading: MBM college is good or bad.
reviews.review_text: MBM University Jodhpur has a spacious campus that carries a blend of heritage charm and modern facilities. The infrastructure is a mix. Some departments are still in older historic buildings, while others have newer blocks and renovated labs with upgraded equipment. The gardens are not well-maintained; they have very long grass. MBM needs well-trained gardeners very much.

reviews.review_heading: Best government college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: One of the oldest engineering colleges in Rajasthan, its infrastructure is similarly old. The library is well-stocked with a decent number of books. The boys' hostel is old, while the girls' hostel is newly built. The mess serves average food. There's a government dispensary right in front of the hostel campus, and sports grounds are also available.

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.
faqs.question: Q: What is covered in Machine Design subject in B.Tech course?

faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college is surrounded by nature and greenery.

content.Placements: 70 to 80 percent of people from our previous batch are placed. The average package is 5 LPA and the highest package is 12 LPA. The whole batch is provided with internship. The faculty is great they provide you with trips and great skills that help you crack the internship easily.
content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi available, the classrooms are pretty decent and the library has ample amount of books. The labs are pretty good. If we talk about mess food, they have lots of variety from veg to non veg.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very knowledgeable and hold a strong degree and will always try to help you professionally and personally. They will help you with literally everything. They have knowledge that will help you with academics. They provide great support and help you build the skill.

content.Placements: There are campus placements and I got one in TCS. Many students are also doing good in their lives even when I was studying in 2nd semester, they provided us with internships in many big companies like CEAT, Tech Mahindra, TCS, etc. This is why love this college.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels of the college really provide nicely cooked food, so hostels are the best in our college because of the food.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are supportive and help students a lot. The course is a bit tough for me I guess. Exams are also taken under CCTV surveillance. I really love how teachers support students even if they are not from their course.

paragraphs: NSHM Institute of Engineering & Technology Durgapur admissions are entrance-based. The institute acceptsWBJEE JELET,JEE Main&WBJEEfor providing admission.NSHM Institute of Engineering and Technologyoffers 14 courses including specialisations underNSHM Knowledge Campus, Durgapur.

Selection criteria:WBJEE/JEE Main

Eligibility:Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics as compulsory subjects (as per WBJEE rules) with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate in case of candidates belonging to reserved category) in the above subjects with individual pass marks (in both theory and practical wherever applicable) in all the three subjects as stated above in regular class mode
Must pass English in Class 10 and Class 12 with at least 30% aggregate
Selection criteria:WBJEE JELET
Eligibility:Diploma in Engineering

Note:Students with Higher Secondary (Science) or equivalent examination and have qualified Joint Entrance Examination (Main) conducted by Central Board of Secondary Education or the Joint Entrance Examination conducted by the West Bengal Joint Entrance Examination Board for admission to Engineering, Pharmacy & Technological Degree Colleges as recommended by West Bengal Joint Entrance Examinations Board.
